Glacadh leis go leanfadh tuiscint na mionlach seo an claochlú seo freisin. De réir Shínigh sé an clárlainne, Munna agus Sos (1999), tá ról ríthábhachtach ag Ciceoos i leith gach scannán agus teilifís a chur chun cinn le tuairimí mhuintir Mheiriceá a chur in iúl. Dá réir sin, tá sé ríthábhachtach na híomhánna a fhoilsíonn siad a scrúdú (mar a luadh in Eschloz, 2000).<br/><br/>Tá athruithe sa tsochaí nua-aimseartha ar róil agus ionchais inscne. Cuimsíonn an femininity traidisiúnta tréithe cosúil le uaisle, íogaireacht, agus bog-labhairt le linn a bhaineann le hiompraíochtaí traidisiúnta cosúil le hiompraíochtaí uaillmhianacha, féinchothaitheacha agus spórtúla. Is féidir le fear a bheith iomaíoch, ag tógáil riosca agus ceannasach, ach is féidir le cáilíochtaí femininity traidisiúnta cosúil le gean, comhbhá agus ceifídiúlacht a thaispeáint ag an am céanna. Ar an gcaoi chéanna, is féidir le bean a bheith tairisceana, glactha agus bog-labhairt ach is féidir leis a bheith uaillmhianach, féin-fhriotaíochta agus spórtúil ag an am céanna. Mar sin féin, gnéas – is fadhb shuntasach sa tsochaí í idirdhealú fós ach tá laghdú tagtha ar a dhéine le himeacht ama agus leanfaidh sé ar aghaidh ag déanamh amhlaidh (Bem, 1974).<br/><br/>Modheolaíocht<br/><br/>Sa roinn seo tabharfar forléargas ar an modheolaíocht agus ar na huirlisí bailithe sonraí a úsáidtear chun an suirbhé a dhéanamh má mhúnlaíonn íomhánna na meán réaltachta agus ról na scannán Hollywood go háirithe maidir le híomhánna de Fíneálacha a mhúnlú.<br/><br/>Modheolaíocht Taighde<br/><br/>Baineann an chuid seo de thaighde leis an modheolaíocht taighde a bhí fostaithe i ndéanamh an staidéir.Is é an staidéar an meascán de mhodhanna taighde cáilíochtúla agus cainníochtúla. Trí úsáid a bhaint as an modheolaíocht seo, is féidir hipitéisí na gceisteanna taighde a thomhas, a chinneadh agus a anailísiú.<br/><br/>Bhí baint ag an staidéar le húsáid na gceistneoirí, ullmhaíodh iad roimh ré, agus rinneadh athbhreithniú ar na ceisteanna chun a n-ábharthacht sa choincheap atá á iniúchadh a aimsiú. Bhí an teanga a úsáideadh sna ceistneoirí réasúnta measartha measarthacht le tuiscint ag na daoine agus tuigeadh an nós imeachta.<br/><br/>Daonra agus Nós Imeachta Sampláil<br/><br/>Is é 20 duine - 10 fear agus 10 bean ó gairmeacha éagsúla an daonra is mó a bhfuil spéis aige sa staidéar seo.Úsáidtear líon mór rannpháirtithe sa sampla.<br/><br/>Ionstraim<br/><br/>Úsáideadh ceistneoirí na suirbhéanna mar ionstraim taighde. Agallamh duine le duine. In aghaidh an agallaimh ar aghaidh, cuireadh ceistneoirí suirbhé ar fáil do na rannpháirtithe go léir chun a leibhéal measta de mhíniú a gcuid tuairimí ar na meáin má mhúnlaíonn sé réaltacht agus ról na scannán Hollywood go háirithe maidir le híomhánna de Fíneálacha a mhúnlú. Bhí dhá chineál ceisteanna oscailte agus dúnta, ag díriú ar ghrúpaí éagsúla ó gairmeacha éagsúla.<br/><br/>Iontaofacht<br/><br/>D’fhonn cloí le hiontaofacht an staidéir seo, roghnaíodh na rannpháirtithe de réir a ngairmeacha éagsúla. D’fhéach na ceistneoirí ar dhaoine ó gairmeacha éagsúla de réir a gceisteanna a shocrú.<br/><br/>Nósanna imeachta bailithe sonraí<br/><br/>D’úsáid an taighdeoir an ceistneoir le haghaidh agallamh domhain. Cuireadh 11 cheist deiridh oscailte ar fáil do gach rannpháirtí agus cuirfidh an taighdeoir ar an eolas faoi agus bhí sé compordach an cheist a fhreagairt. Mhair an suirbhé seo ar feadh leath uair an chloig.<br/><br/>Torthaí Taighde Bunscoile<br/><br/>Is trí cheistneoirí a dhéanamh a rinneadh an príomhthaighde seo agus scaipeadh na ceistneoirí sin i measc 20 rannpháirtí. Roinneadh na rannpháirtithe in dhá ghrúpa - 10 bean agus 10 mbliana d’aois. Rinneadh an taighde seo chun sonraí a bhailiú. Mhínigh gach rannpháirtí go soiléir gach ceist.<br/><br/>Taispeántar torthaí an agallaimh thíos<br/><br/>Agus é ag iarraidh faoi chineálacha comhlachtaí fireann a léiríonn roinnt meáin a léiríonn go minic go léiríonn an tionscal fógraíochta toned, veilbhit, Brad Pitt-mhaith jocks.Ach dúirt an tionscal siamsaíochta eile a sciar cothrom de na fir pot-bellied cosúil le Jack Black. Mar fhreagra ar an gceist má tá tionchar díreach ag na híomhánna ar dhearcadh na bhfear fúthu féin. Dúirt cúpla fear go ndéanann sé difear, b’fhéidir, do thuiscint na bhfear óga a chreidiúint go gcaithfidh siad sé-phacáiste a bheith acu ach luaigh fir áirithe gurb é an teachtaireacht d’fhir meánaosta ná go mbeidh comhpháirtí taibhseach baineann acu, is cuma cén cineál coirp atá acu féin.<br/><br/>Agus í ag iarraidh faoi na cineálacha mná a thaispeánann na meáin, dúirt cuid de na mná go bhfuil an chuma ar chomhlachtaí baineann de gach aois agus ar fud na meán a bheith tanaí agus petite. Agus luaigh cuid acu go bhfuil eisceachtaí cosúil le Melissa McCarthy, ach tá na heisceachtaí seo fós beag agus is minic teoranta do seánra grinn. Mar fhreagra ar an gceist má tá na híomhánna difear go díreach ar an dearcadh na mban faoi iad féin, d'fhreagair cuid acu go bhfuil sé fíor gur gá do mhná fanacht tanaí agus taibhseach ar fad trína saol ach dúirt cuid acu go bhfuil siad sásta lena bpearsantacht féin is cuma cad atá acu. Nuair a iarraidh faoi má meastar go bhfuil íomhánna den sórt sin oiriúnach sa tsochaí, d’fhreagair roinnt ban nach bhfuil ann cinnte ós rud é go gcuireann na híomhánna seo tuiscint neamhréadúil agus idéalach i bhfeidhm ar eipidéim na neamhoird a ithe agus an fhéinmheas íseal ar fud glúin iomlán de dhaoine óga, ar fud an domhain.<br/><br/>Luaigh siad freisin nach bhfuil íomhánna den sórt sin réalaíoch ag féachaint ar fud na ndaoine in aon chathair ar domhan, is léir gurb iad cineálacha coirp den sórt sin an eisceacht agus ní an gnáthrud. Nuair a iarrtar ort má tá imprisean bréagacha ann sna meáin faoi fhir agus mhná ag breathnú, d’fhreagair cuid acu go bhfolaíonn an t-aer- scuabadh fíor-uigeacht craiceann nádúrtha. An réamhfhocal samhlacha Caucasian seolann teachtaireacht chaighdeán "bán" na háilleachta.Fir siopadóireachta grianghraf figiúirí daoine fíor isteach i gcomhlachtaí androidgus gan aon flesh orthu.<br/><br/>Mar fhreagra ar an gceist má tá fir ar bith mar phríomhcharachtar faoi thábhacht na bhfear inár sochaí i gcomparáid le mná agus leanaí, dúirt roinnt daoine go dtugann scaoileadh "Muiniúin" cúpla le déanaí soiléiriú ar na gníomhartha de ghrúpa fir a chosaint go cróga ar an stór ealaíne ó bheith scriosta ag an Ghearmáin Naitsithe. Mar sin féin, bhí an scéal fíor-mhéan ag roinnt de na mná a chabhraigh leis an tasc contúirteach seo. Trí scriosadh gach ceann de na carachtair baineann, cuireann an scannán an dearcadh domhanda go bhfuil mná in ann a chur ar fáil dár sochaí agus dá stair. Mar fhreagra ar an gceist más féidir leis an carachtar baineann i scannán a chur i gcomparáid lena ról sa 'domhan fíor', a luaitear go bhfuil mná go minic mar carachtair cúlra sa chuid is mó de scannáin, den chuid is mó dhá carachtair tríthoiseach – bhean chéile, cailín, comhpháirtí – ach i gcónaí a bhaineann leis na fir ina saol.<br/><br/>Tá mná fíor saoil níos déine, níos cliste, agus tá ról i bhfad níos mó acu i saol a dteaghlaigh agus a sochaithe.Dúirt cuid acu gur minic go mbíonn steiréitíopaí i scannáin – sopóipy, vamp, slutty, etc. Tá mná sa saol fíor i bhfad níos casta agus go minic le chéile go leor tréithe na steiréitíopaí, agus níos mó. Agus iad ag freagairt na ceiste má fheidhmíonn mná i scannáin mar eiseamláirí, dúirt roinnt mná go léiríonn léiriú ban i scannáin a seasamh tánaisteach sa tsochaí. In ainneoin go bhfuil siad leath den chine daonna, ní aithníonn na meáin ach iad mar leath den "margadh" dá tháirgí. Níl go leor samhlacha dea-ról do mhná sna scannáin, in ainneoin an fás le déanaí ar théamaí na mban dírithe le carachtair mná láidre, mar shampla "The Hunger Games" nó "Fronen".<br/><br/>Plé<br/><br/>Léirigh an suirbhé go raibh tionchar ag leath de na fir agus na mná ar na meáin as a n-íomhá coirp. D'fhreagair an chuid is mó díobh go ndearna siad tagairt do na "idéalach" seo "comhlachtaí fireann/baineann". Luaigh cuid acu gur thaitin leo gníomhú mar aisteoir nó aisteoir is fearr leo ina dtithe.<br/><br/>Thug an toradh ar an suirbhé cineál leathan freagraí a léirigh sna meáin tionchar díreach ar dhearcadh na mban fúthu féin agus ní mór do mhná fanacht tanaí agus taibhseach ar fad trína saol ach ní raibh tionchar ag roinnt mná ar na híomhánna seo. Tá roinnt mná ag smaoineamh seo go meastar go bhfuil íomhánna den sórt sin oiriúnach sa tsochaí.De réir iad, déanann na híomhánna seo dearcadh neamhréadúil agus idéalach.<br/><br/>Ról an phictiúrlann Hollywood i Múnlaiú Íomhánna de Fínéagró<br/><br/>Sa tréimhse an Dara Cogadh Domhanda, dhírigh fócas na scannán Hollywood atá claonta i dtreo léiriú shaol na fo-uirbeach. Bhí léiriú na mban teoranta do na mná tí baininscneach, atá milis agus ceannasach agus atá fós teoranta dá teach. Chuir Betty Friedan's 'The Fminine Mysque' (1963), tús leis an díospóireacht faoi rúin istigh na mná tí láraicme a raibh saol lag uaigneach acu. Chuir sé seo leis an uasghrádú inscne, ar bith, a bhí ar siúl sa tsochaí (Perricio, n.d., lch. 55). I 1967 agus níos déanaí, thosaigh scannáin ag léiriú an uilc seo i bhfoirm mná tí a bhfuil gnóthaí acu agus atá ag lorg teiripí agus atá ag tabhairt aghaidh ar miondealuithe meabhrach. Léirigh na scannáin an suaitheadh atá i réim ina saol ach níor chuir siad aon teiripe (Perrucio, n.d.).<br/><br/>Ionadaíocht na mBan i róil cheannródaíocha: Na staidéir a rinneadh ar athbhreithniú a dhéanamh ar áit na mban lena n-áirítear tréimhse ama de 50 bliain molta nach raibh aon áit shuntasach acu sna scannáin nó sna cláir príomh-ama. Léirítear i saothair Jones (1942); Clarke (1969); Segogar et al 1981; Douglas (1995); agus mar sin de, nochtann go leor taighdeoirí eile nach bhfuil ionadaíocht na mban dáiríre agus go léiríonn siad iad níos comhlíontach dá bhfíorstaid sa tsochaí (mar a luadh in Eschholz et al, 2002). Dearbhaíonn na staidéir seo freisin nach dtairgtear ach róil nach bhfuil chomh suntasach agus chomh steiréitíopáilte dóibh.<br/><br/>Rinne Eschholz et al. staidéar ar 50 scannán mór le rá i 1996 chun léiriú ban agus mionfhir ar an scáileán a scrúdú sna 1990í. Fuair siad ina gcuid staidéir go bhfuil "Cé go bhfuil mná agus mionlaigh araon tar éis dul trasna teorainneacha traidisiúnta go leor san obair agus i dtéarmaí noirm shóisialta, tá tionscal scannán Hollywood faoi úinéireacht agus á reáchtáil go príomha ag fireannaigh bán" (Eschholz et al. 2002, lch. 313). Léirigh sé an fear bán chun tosaigh go leanúnach ar an ionadaíocht scáileáin. Ní dhearnadh mná a chuimsíonn 51 faoin gcéad den daonra iomlán sna Stáit Aontaithe (B Biúró Daonáirimh na Stát Aontaithe 1990) ach amháin i 35 % de na príomhróil a léiríonn leitheadúlacht na bhfeistí traidisiúnta sna 1990í freisin. I bhfianaise léiriú na mionlaigh ciníoch agus eiticiúla, mar an gcéanna ar an bpátrún corrach buan a bhí i gceist, ní raibh ach 20 % de na carachtair luaidhe san Afraic nó sa Hispanic. Ina theannta sin, caitheadh na carachtair luaidhe seo go príomha i scannáin a raibh daonra neamh-bán den chuid is mó acu.<br/><br/>Ionadaíocht na mban in aois i scannáin Hollywood: Na staidéir roimhe seo ar an chóireáil femininity sa scannáin Hollywood le fios go raibh tábhacht mhór ag baint leis an chuma fhisiceach na mban agus léiriú a n-tarraingteacht óige. Bhí mná meánaosta agus mná níos sine beagnach eisiata ó na róil a imirt i scannáin. D’éirigh léiriú na gcarachtar fireann go hiomlán mar gheall ar a stíl ghnéasach agus a ghaoitheach ag fás le aibíocht. Léirigh sé seo luachanna fógróirí Mheiriceá agus steiréitíopaí tomhaltóirí a bhraitheann go bhfuil na mná a bhaint amach an zenith de áilleacht óige agus charm ina déagóirí agus fichidí.<br/><br/>Athraíonn a n-tarraingteacht fhisiciúil go haois agus go n-athraíonn siad i ról mar mháithreacha, áfach, bhí fir ag fás mar dhaoine cliste agus tarraingteach agus bhí siad ag coinneáil gnéasachta fiú mar aithreacha agus mar a mháthairaitheoirí (Wolf 1991; Falfius 1991; Douglas 1995 mar a luadh in Eschholz et al, 2002). De réir Halla (1995) agus Rhodes (1993) ionchorpraíodh an t-idirdhealú seo i steiréitíopáil an cumas intleachtúil firinscneach agus baininscneach freisin (mar a luadh in Eschholz et al, 2002). Léirítear na mionlaigh den chuid is mó i róil óga, comic agus choiriúla. Fuair Btaa- Fernandez agus Greenberg (1980) amach gur léiríodh na Meiriceánaigh bhána i níos aibí agus níos sine ná a gcomhghleacaithe Afracacha (mar a luadh in Eschholz et al, 2002).<br/><br/>Thacaigh na staidéir seo le torthaí Thuarascáil Choimisiún um Chearta Sibhialta na Stát Aontaithe (1977) "claonadhann fir bána a bheith níos sine agus níos aibí, agus is mó seans go mbeidh mná agus fir mionlaigh níos óige agus níos lú aibí" (mar a luadh i Eschholz et al, 2002 lch. 306). Fuair Eschholz et al (2002) go raibh an t-idirdhealú sa critéar aoise do na fireannaigh agus baineannaigh comhsheasmhach sna 1990í freisin. Cuireadh formhór na mban i láthair faoi aois 30 nó níos óige ach cuireadh fireannaigh i láthair níos sine, níos aibí agus fiú ina 50idí.<br/><br/>Ionadaíocht ar stádas pósta agus tuismitheoir na mban: I staidéir roimhe seo léirítear an t-aonad teaghlaigh patriarchal mar an múnla ina bhfuil carachtair baineann ag súil a cloí leis an ról traidisiúnta baininscneach a chur i gcrích a gcuid freagrachtaí mar mhná céile agus máithreacha. Ní mheastar go bhfuil tábhacht lena ndea-mheas gairme. Os a choinne sin, léiríonn fir tréithe an-firinscneacha, mar shampla an ceart a bheith acu agus an tsaoirse chun dul i ngleic leis na dúshláin agus an rath a bhaineann lena dteaghlach a bhaint amach. Ní dócha go mbeadh na máithreacha ag obair lasmuigh den bhaile níos mó ná fir ag gabháil tábhacht do phósadh agus do thuismitheoir (Eschholz, 2002).<br/><br/>róil Gnéas sa mhargadh saothair agus gradam ceirde: Is léir i staidéir ar Clarke (1969); Roberts (1970/71); Long and Simon (1974); Northcut et a íoc is mó a bhí i measc fir ar an scáileán. D’fhéadfaí réaltacht scáileáin a thabhairt mar shaol an duine bhán fiú nuair a bhí gluaiseacht na feimineach claonais (mar a luadh i Eschholz et al, 2002). Mar sin féin, léirigh Jap 1991; Graham agus Massio (1995/96); Signorelli agus Bace (1999) go raibh feabhas éigin ag baint le léiriú róil cheirde na mban mar gheall ar an ghluaiseacht feimineach. Mar sin féin, bhí an-chion ag cainníocht agus cáilíocht do róil ghairmiúla shuntasacha agus cháiliúla do mhná (mar a luadh in Eschholz et al, 2002).<br/><br/>Fuair Vende Berg agus Streckfus (1991) amach gur taispeánadh 67 faoin gcéad den obair a bhaineann le gníomhaíochtaí fireanna in earnálacha fostaíochta inar áiríodh go minic carachtair baineanna díolacháin miondíola agus seirbhís. Ní raibh aon mhná sa tionscal agus sna fir ag claonadh na poist eagrúcháin níos airde a shealbhú (mar a luadh i Eschholz et go léir, 2002). Eschholz et a fuarthas freisin ina gcuid staidéir ar 50 scannáin comhlánaithe de 1996 go fireann scannáin scannáin le haghaidh ceannas i réimse. Mar sin féin, níor bhain an staidéar seo leis na staidéir a rinneadh roimhe seo maidir le stádas fostaíochta agus mionlaigh ciniciúil. Cé go léiríonn an t-athbhreithniú ar an sampla nach raibh an chuid is mó de na neamh-bán ar an bhfostaíocht go dtí go raibh na scannáin críochnaithe. Na trí róil luaidhe na hAfraice san scannán 'Socraigh sé é, a bhí fostaithe ar dtús ach nach raibh a shealbhú sé go dtí an deireadh eiseamláirí an treocht seo.<br/><br/>De bharr an méid sin, léiríodh go raibh an triúr ban as bán i nGlóthach an Chéad Ghrásaigh ag bronnadh gradam ar chríochnú an scannáin. Taispeánadh ionadaíocht na mban bán mar spleách ar a gcomhghleacaithe fireanna ó thaobh airgeadais de. Léiríodh an difríocht inscne a bhaineann le hionadaíocht ghairme mar ní raibh sí soshannta i staidéar scannáin 1996 50 a bhí i bhfad níos gaire don réaltacht shóisialta ag an am sin. Mar sin féin, bhí difríochtaí ciníocha le gradam i bhfad níos ísle a ghabhann le gradam ceirde Meiriceánaigh Afracacha sna scannáin. Bhí réamh-mheastachán ar an difríocht seo i gcomparáid leis an bhfíor-staid sa tsochaí. Tugann an staidéar le fios go raibh saoirse ceirde sna scannáin do na mionlach baineann agus ciníocha, ach bhí an léiriú ar fhir sna gairmeacha is mó le rá ar na mná i scannáin a raibh tionchar acu orthu (Eschholz et al, 2002 lch. 319).<br/><br/>Scaoileadh céad scannán idir na tréimhsí 1946 go 1989 chun a fháil amach an claochlú i ról na mban sna scannáin Hollywood. Fuair sé amach nach raibh an cóimheas baineann fireann thaispeáint aon athrú ar an áit na mban mar ionadaíocht siad ach cúig faoin gcéad de na carachtair sna scannáin seo. Léiríodh gur obair taobh amuigh de mhná na seascaidí a bhí ina mná sa bhliain 1960í mar scannáin a bhí ina gcomhaltaí den ghluaiseacht feimineach sna scannáin ón mbliain 1976 go dtí 1989. Chomh maith leis seo, léiríonn sé go léirítear an bhean nua-aimseartha mar dhaoine atá níos scoite amach ag tús gnéis, ag a bhfuil caidreamh gnéis lasmuigh den phósadh agus ag gabháil do ghníomhaíochtaí foréigneacha. Is cosúil go bhfuil an staidéar seo i gcodarsnacht leis an gcuid is mó de na staidéir a fhaigheann heigeamon firinscneach san ionad oibre agus i gcaidreamh gnéis (Rothman et al 1993 mar a luadh i Eschholz et al, 2002).<br/><br/>Inscne: Nochtann na staidéir ar ábhar teilgean maslacha agus femininity sa phictiúrlann sa 20ú haois go léirítear fir bhána ina dtrasnú agus ina n-ionsaí. Tuartar gur iad na réitigh fadhbanna agus is féidir leo dul chuig aon teorainneacha chun a gcuspóirí a bhaint amach. Déantar fir mionlaigh a chur faoi réir an phríomhphicne atá dírithe ar an sprioc de ghnáth agus tairgtear dóibh na róil comic a imirt chun aird neamhbheartaithe a lorg nó chun coirpigh trócaireacha a chaitheamh (Halla, 1995; Rhodes, 1993 mar a luaitear in Eschholz et al, 2002).<br/><br/>Taispeánann na staidéir seo leitheadúlacht na dtréithe atá 'na míniúlacht mheigeabhónach' a bhaineann leis na fireannaigh bána sa teilifís agus sa scannán. Tá cur i láthair baineann ar an scáileán claonta i dtreo femininity traidisiúnta agus léiríonn an ionadaíocht mionlach fireannaigh sna scannáin an fhir fho-ordaithe. Cuirtear i láthair iad i róil steiréitipiceacha nach bhfuil tábhacht leo san fhórsa saothair agus sa chóras dlí. Fuarthas é i staidéar ar ionadaíocht na mionlach inscne agus ciníoch i scannáin 1996 go raibh níos claonta i dtreo traidisiúnta traidisiúnta agus bhí carachtair mná níos claonta i dtreo femininity traidisiúnta agus femininity rómánsúil.<br/><br/>Mar sin féin bhí roinnt eisceachtaí ann mar "Jery, a bhí ag Tom Cruise i Jerry Maguire rangaithe go maith os cionn an mheáin maidir le firinscneach traidisiúnta, magadh intleachtúil, dílseacht thraidisiúnta, agus dílseacht rómánsúil" (Eschholz et al, 2002, lch.320). Léirigh go leor cúpla carachtar mná leibhéil farraige de fhiriúlacht agus femininity i scannáin Hollywood 1996. Na carachtair de "Reeneus (Renee Russo) i Leid Corn, Karen (Sally Fields) i Súl le haghaidh a Súl, Tally (M Michelle Pelifer) i Up Close agus Pearsanta, Cloch (Jada pinket) i Set É, agus Brandin Whitefield) i Líne Thin Love agus Taispeáin Teicn Leibhéil dian araon de femininity agus "Eschholz et al.<br/><br/>Go ginearálta, thrasnaigh na carachtair seo na teorainneacha inscne mar gheall ar roinnt taithí mhór ina saol. Is samplaí de na cineálacha tréithe inscne seo iad íogaireacht mhéadaithe Jerry (Jery Maguire) agus a shlí bheatha (Súil ar líne agus ar Súil) de bharr éigniú a hiníon. Bhí tréithe Spreagadhacha (mídeic, mí-iontaofacht agus ionramháil) níos soiléire i bhfireannaigh ná na tréithe baininscneach níos dearfaí cosúil le femininity traidisiúnta agus femininity rómánsúil. Mar sin féin, mhol na torthaí seo cruinneas na dtorthaí taighde roimhe seo. Léirigh fir bhána, mar eisceacht, scóir níos mó maidir le léiriú a dhéanamh ar shilteanaíocht dhéchalbhach ná na mná bána (Eschholz et al. 2002).<br/><br/>D’fhorbair an phictiúrlann Mheiriceá is fiche a haonú mar fhórsa gníomhach i dtuiscint an chaidrimh inscne. Mar sin féin, sa chuid roimhe seo den chéid ní raibh na táirgeoirí agus an pobal a fheiceáil an íomhá meáin na mban mar ionadaíocht ar éagothroime shóisialta. De réir a chéile, bhí níos mó imní ag léirmheastóirí agus ag lucht féachana faoi ról na scannán chun na luachanna sóisialta, na hinstitiúidí agus an dearcadh a chinneadh. Thosaigh scríbhneoirí Mheiriceá ar nós Molly Haskell agus Marjoie Rosen chomh maith le Joan Meln i lár na n-eachtraí ag taispeáint ionsaí ar na h-ídé-eolaíochtaí dúshlánach ar róil inscne agus gnéasachta baineann i bpictiúrlann Classic Hollywood. Chreid Haskell gur mó a bhí dírithe ar scannáin Hollywood ar anam agus slánú an duine a léiriú. Is ar éigean gur tharla aon chuma agus tábhacht sna scannáin ar na carachtair baineann. D’oibrigh siad mar phointe tagartha agus taispeántais do na róil cheannródaíocha ba shiocair leis na róil sin nárbh aontaigh siad agus nach raibh tuairim acu féin ina dtaobh. Ba bhaol dóibh an réaltacht firinscneach agus dá bhrí sin, rinne siad éighníomhach, neamh-idirghníomhach agus báite sa chóras sóisialta patriarchal (Wardak, 2013).<br/><br/>Bhí an Tonn Nua Hollywood ar feadh tréimhse idir na lár- 1960idí agus na 1980í luatha.<br/><br/>Chun ról na scannán Hollywood i múnlú femininity i ndáiríre a thuiscint, ní mór dúinn breathnú go dlúth ar chuid de na scannáin móréilimh bunaithe ar théama na baininscneach tipiciúil agus ar a dtionchar ar íomhá na femininity sa tsochaí a mhúnlú.<br/><br/>Bonnie agus Cllyde (1967)<br/><br/>Is sampla é seo den tonn nua feminismeach a bhí ar siúl i Hollywood ag an bpointe ama sin. Léiríonn an scannán seo an carachtar Bonnie Parker mar thoradh ar idéalach baineann atá difriúil go leor ó róil thraidisiúnta na mban, máithreacha nó rudaí gnéis.Léiríonn an carachtar Bonnie an friotaíocht bean i sochaí ceannasach fireann. Tá sí láidir go leor chun a cuid cinntí féin agus mianta a chothú. Díríonn an scannán ar shaoirse na sochaíocha agus cuireann sí téama sainiúil i measc na pictiúrlainne Hollywood New Wave.<br/><br/>I Bonnie agus Clide, léiríonn Clyren Barrow (Batetyren) carachtar cheannaire an gang a bhfuil baint aige le robáil na mbanc agus Bonnie Parker (Faye Dunaway) carachtar a leannán agus comhchoirí sa robáil.<br/><br/>I measc na réabhlóide gnéis a shroichfidh a buaic, na mná a bhfuil teas agus saoirse gnéasach acu.Ina iarracht chun saol saortha a threorú, fásann sí mar shiombail gnéis sa deireadh agus baineann sí clú agus cáil amach trí spree coireachta. Léiríonn radharc oscailte an scannáin a ocras ar rud éigin breise nach bhfuil sí.<br/><br/>Léiríonn an scannán a carachtar ar bhealach il-toiseach trí dhéanamh di a bheith níos láidre lena gnéasacht. Ar mhian léi a saol a athrú mar fhreastalaí, athraíonn sí i bean muiníneach a bhfuil an gunna aici agus a dtagann comhchoirí chun bheith ina gcoir agus lena grá Clyde. Ag taispeáint na dtréithe fothminacha neamhbhreannacha, téann sí i dteagmháil léi go neamhfhilleadh isteach sa spróitic choiriúil agus úsáideann sí a fuinneamh cruthaitheach sa dán "The Story of Bonnie agus Clyde." Ardaíonn an feminism a léirítear i Bonnie agus i Clley roinnt saincheisteanna feimineacha.<br/><br/>Léirítear na ceisteanna a bhaineann le róil ghnéasachta na mban agus na róil inscne a bhíonn ag athrú sa scannán.<br/><br/>Is é Sunstad, ina airteagal "Ach ní bheadh ort an Gumption a úsáid ": Bonnie agus Clyd agus an Réabhlóid Gnéasach, scrúdaíonn sé an téama bunúsach feminism a léirítear sa scannán. Dearbhaíonn sí go raibh Mianán ar mhíshástacht Bonnie leis an stiúrthóir ar dtús. "Pen féin cur síos ar an ord oscailte mar — gar-suas de a liopaí ocras.... sin an rud atá sé --ocras ar feadh níos mó ná a bheith ann i láthair" (Lunstad, n.d, lch.15).<br/><br/>Díríonn an ceamara ar a aghaidh agus ansin leagann an comhlacht nocht béim ar a frustrachas leis an ról traidisiúnta baininscneach.Ina theannta sin, léiríonn sí a aghaidh idir na barraí a mholann go bhfuil sí ina cás cheana. Ina dhiaidh sin, "a imfhálú iomlán i bhfráma na fuinneoige le fios ní amháin go bhfuil a spriongaí capitse óna mian i gceannas, ach go bhfuil sí frámaithe go meiteamatally mar ionadaíocht neamhghrafaiceach ar an mban seascaidí gan staonadh" (Lunstad, n.d, lch.15). Mothaíonn Luntik go bhfuil carachtar Bonnie, trína gnéasacht, déanann sé an spreagadh innate de bhean a shásamh í féin i gcomhthéacs sochaíoch nach bhfuil a cheadú. Deir sí nach bhfuil an íomhá di ar an scáileán imirt i fantasies fireann maidir leis an gcomhlacht baineann, ach a láithreacht mar bhean gnéasach go hiomlán, laistigh de chomhthéacs na mban ar ghluaiseacht, dearbhaíonn sí cearta na mban a chur i bhfeidhm a chéile dúil gnéasach" (Lunstad, n.d., lch.17). Léiríonn carachtar Bonnie, agus tá tionchar aige go fírinneach ar na noirm shochaíocha, atá i réim le linn ghluaiseacht na feimineach, le paisean agus croílár chomh maith le figiúr gnéasach sásúil.<br/><br/>Alice Ní Cónaíonn Beo anseo Níos mó (1974)<br/><br/>Léiríonn an scannán seo streachailt baineann in amhras saoirse ó shrianta na noirm shóisialta. Léirítear Alice (Eln Burstyn) mar bhean tí tí dhualteach a bhaineann le rang oibre agus a bhfuil a saol dírithe ar a fear céile a mhaisiú agus a mac neamh-inmhianaithe a chothú. Léiríonn an scéal téamaí baininscneach den chomhionannas i ngach gné den saol príobháideach agus poiblí atá i réim sa tréimhse sin i 1960í agus i 1970idí. Léirítear Alice mar bhean tí 35 bliana d'aois a bhfuil tiománaí trucail acu. Tar éis bhás a fir chéile, ba mhaith léi a leanúint ar ghairm san amhránaíocht (a gairm roimh phósadh) ina bhaile dúchais.<br/><br/>Léiríonn an scannán turas Alice mar mháthair amháin, freisin mar bhean a bhfuil roinnt aisling a chomhlíonadh agus a n-uaillmhianta chun go n-éireoidh leis. Léiríonn a dearcadh i leith neamhspleáchais mianta na mban Meiriceánach atá ag streachailt ar son an chomhionannais agus na saoirse i róil inscne. Le linn a turais, bíonn sí feasach ar an bhfíric nach féidir léi a chaitheamh a saol le duine a bheadh ag déileáil léi mar fhothasach agus níos lú agus ar deireadh, ag fás comhpháirtíocht rómánsúil comhionann le David. Bhí mná Mheiriceá ag an bpointe sin a bhí ag streachailt leis na saincheisteanna comhchosúla a shainaithin siad an carachtar Alice a bhí ag streachailt le slí bheatha nach raibh oiliúint fhoirmiúil ná oideachas acu. D’fhéach siad ar fheimineachas mar an bealach amach ó shrianta sochaí an chórais patriarchal.<br/><br/>Mná Céile Stepford (2004)<br/><br/>Ba é an scannán seo an remake of the film, Stepford Wives (Forbes, 1975). Tríd an scannán seo rinneadh iarracht féachaint ar na saincheisteanna is fearr ar nós céannacht ghnéasach baininscneach maidir leis an gcóras patriarchal i sochaí Mheiriceá. Léirigh sé míshástacht na mban uirbeach laistigh den díshealbhú tí (Peruccio, n.d).<br/><br/>Tá an scannán faoi athrú Joanna lena teaghlach i mbaile Stepford, a thagann de réir a chéile ar fud rún an bhaile a bhfuil a mhná robots. Tá bunthéamaí an scannáin molta do fhiriúlacht, do shíliseacht agus do chaidrimh chumhachta inscne a léiríonn an teachta firinscneach agus an chois atá ag saoirse na mban agus a n-uaillmhianta a chur in iúl. Léiríonn an scannán na róil striotipiciúil mná a léiríonn femininity traidisiúnta mar a breathnaíodh sa tsochaí i gcoitinne. Léirítear na mná céile ag déanamh chora laethúla ar nós cócaireacht, glanadh agus ar ndóigh riachtanais a bhfear céile a chomhlíonadh i ngach slí amháin.<br/><br/>Níl mórán eagna acu, ar a laghad, gan dul thar faisnéis a bhfear céile, agus tá siad as aon phost a éilíonn intleacht agus is féidir leis cur leis an ngeilleagar. Is léiriú ar thréithe idéalach na femininity traidisiúnta na mná a chuireann mná tí idéalach i sochaithe patriarchal nach bhfuil chomh huaillmhianach agus nach bhfuil a dtuairimí féin acu. Tá tábhacht shiombalach na micrea-sceallóga ina n-inchinn freisin suntasach.Mar sin, tá siad léirithe faoi smacht iomlán ar a bhfear céile, i ndán dóibh fanacht sa réimse baile, ag freastal ar a bhfear céile go díograiseach agus go foghabhálach.<br/><br/>Ó thaobh na firinscneach de, léirítear fir na dtionscadal scannán i bhfear traidisiúnta iomlán.Tá ionadaíocht acu mar steiréitíopaí a léiríonn fíorfhir a gcuid éachtaí i gcomparáid le héachtaí na mban. Is sampla maith é an scannán de na cumainn patriarchal a thugann faoi mhíbhuntáistí na bhfear agus na mban araon.<br/><br/>Mona Lisa Smile(2003)<br/><br/>Mar sin féin, ní léiríonn an scannán an tréimhse níos traidisiúnta nach raibh aon ionchais shóisialta ann do mhná, agus dhírigh siad go príomha ar shainchónaí agus ar leibhéal áirithe foseirbhíse. Léiríonn sé go bhfuil coimhlint géar idir an dá dhearcadh eile a ndéanann an feimineoir liobrálacha Katherine Watson, agus traidisiúnta Betty Warren. Cuirtear an dearcadh feimineach i láthair mar aonad bunúsach, uatha, mar a fheictear i radharc seductive agus róthoiseach na mban atá teoranta do róil intíre. Déantar castacht na streachailt inscne a íoslaghdú toisc go dtéann an scannán ar aghaidh i dtreo dheireadh rogha carachtar John (Julia Stiles) fanacht sa bhaile le páistí agus le teaghlaigh seachas a bheith ag obair i Scoil Dlí Yale. Cuireann an cás seo sampla i láthair don lucht féachana a bhféadfadh léirmhíniú difriúil a bheith ag an bhfeimineachas ar dhaoine éagsúla. Ba chóir rogha na mban a bheith gar dá dteaghlach agus dá leanaí agus aire a thabhairt dóibh a bheith curtha in iúl mar clinging ar an ról inscne steiréitíopa.<br/><br/>Is mná fíor iad na carachtair seo a bhfuil a gcuid lochtanna, streachailt agus laigí orthu. Tá siad ag streachailt lena saol a athrú agus a shaoradh ó na teorainneacha a bhaineann leis an gcóras sóisialta patriarchal. Bíonn siad ag streachailt go fisiciúil agus go mothúchánach chun a neamhspleáchas féin a bhaint amach.<br/><br/>Conclúid<br/><br/>Tá ról ríthábhachtach ag na meáin maidir le tionchar a imirt ar dhearcadh daoine maidir lena bhféiniúlacht sa tsochaí ina bhfuil siad ina gcónaí.Dá bhrí sin, oibríonn na meáin mar cheannasach maidir lenár réaltachtaí sóisialta a chur in iúl. Bhí ról ceirde ag Fireann ar an teilifís agus is minic a léiríodh mná tí traidisiúnta steiréitíopaí cosúil le mná céile maithe, máithreacha a chothú, brí agus freastalaithe. Baineann léiriú ar na fógraí scáileáin beaga fós mar an gcéanna le thart ar 10 mbliana ó shin.Tá ról suntasach ag fógráin maidir le híomhánna idéalacha, ciníocha agus sexist d’fhir agus do mhná a chur in iúl. Níl aon mhíniú ag na fógróirí ar íomhá as a riocht ar femininity a léiriú trí na meáin.<br/><br/>D’fhormhuinigh na meáin eisiamh agus steiréitíopaí a tháinig chun cóireáil d’éipitheach agus de mheon ciníoch sa tsochaí. Tá léiriú neamhréadúil na mban agus mionlach ag na meáin freagrach as na tomhaltóirí a chur ar an eolas faoi hipearchail cine agus inscne. Léiríonn léiriú léiriú na mban ar scannáin a seasamh tánaisteach sa tsochaí. In ainneoin iad a bheith leath den chine daonna, aithníonn na meáin iad ach mar leath den "margadh" le haghaidh a chuid táirgí.Níl go leor samhlacha maithe ann do mhná sna scannáin. Léiríonn athbhreithniú ar roinnt de na scannáin a bhfuil téama feimineach acu gurb é an téama bunúsach atá acu ná míshástacht na mban lena ról éighníomhach agus fho-mhór sa chóras sóisialta patriarchal.<br/><br/>Annted Leabharliosta<br/><br/>Leabhair<br/><br/>Díríonn údair an leabhair seo go príomha ar na hábhair a bhaineann le rang, inscne, cine-eitneachas, aois, teaghais gheografach srl. agus dearcadh sóisialta. Tugtar forléargas cuimsitheach, teoiriciúil, ar bhunphrionsabail na Socheolaíochta, le húsáid taighde agus sonraí léiritheacha maidir leis na gnéithe socheolaíochta thuasluaite. Pléann na húdair ról na meán i léiriú ar an íomhá neamhréadúil de femininity trí mheáin éagsúla agus go háirithe trí fhógraí. Cuireann an leabhar seo an iarracht ar an sóisialachas, Melissa Milke, agus scrúdú á dhéanamh acu ar ról na geilitín cultúrtha i dtaobh léiriú neamhréadúil na femininity sna meáin a chinneadh agus a chothú.<br/><br/>Déanann na húdair san alt seo iarracht a nochtadh conas a théann cumarsáid idirghabhálaithe i bhfeidhm ar thógáil sóisialta cine agus inscne sna Stáit Aontaithe. Pléann siad freisin conas a théann na meáin seo i bhfeidhm ar ár dearcadh cine agus inscne sa tsochaí.<br/><br/>Insíonn an chaibidil seo coincheapa bunúsacha a bhaineann leis na meáin agus cultúr, a léiríonn dearcadh na heolaíochta agus na tógála sóisialta.Tar éis plé a dhéanamh ar chineálacha éagsúla foinsí sna meáin, pléann an chaibidil seo tuilleadh faoi na héifeachtaí sna meáin.<br/><br/>Léiríonn an leabhar go bhfuil tionchar ag na meáin ar thógáil sóisialta na fírinne. Soláthraíonn sé bunghnéithe na hoibre sna meáin, a teoiric agus a stair agus pléitear conas a dhéileálann daoine sna meáin le hathruithe iar-nua-aimseartha. Pléann sé freisin ról na geilitíneoirí cultúrtha i láthair na mban le híomhá as riochtú ar na meáin. Ina theannta sin, nochtann na húdair, ag tagairt d'obair Melissa Milk "Íomhá Conspóideach Feiniméad: Anailís ar Thogairí Cultúrtha' le 'Cailín Fíor' Critic", tuiscint ar dhaoine sna meáin atá freagrach as na híomhánna seo a chruthú.<br/><br/>Éabhlóid an Phobail (n.d.)<br/><br/>Tugann an chaibidil seo léargas ar an tábhacht a bhaineann le cleachtais chaidrimh phoiblí ó na hamanna ársa. Caitheann sé solas ar éabhlóid leanúnach na modhanna caidrimh phoiblí a úsáidtear ó am go chéile go ré nua-aimseartha. Ina theannta sin, féachann sé ar ionchur na bpríomhphátrúnachta i réimse an chaidrimh phoiblí.<br/><br/>Airteagail<br/><br/>Baineann an t-alt le coincheap na hinscne i dtéarmaí síceolaíochta. Léiríonn an t-údar, Sandra Bem, tréithe na ilfheidhmeacha traidisiúnta agus na femininity traidisiúnta atá le fáil i n-iompraíochtaí daoine éagsúla. Míníonn sí gur féidir cothromaíocht idir na hiompraíochtaí láidre fearónach agus fear baininscneach a choinneáil chun feidhmiú go cuí i gcúinsí éagsúla. Faigheann sí aicmiú eile inscne ina leith seo ar a dtugtar androgynous (tagraíonn androno do mhná agus do mhná).<br/><br/>Tá an t-údar san alt seo ag scrúdú conas a dhéanann na scannáin Hollywood mná agus mionlaigh, trí dhaoine a chatagóiriú i go leor catagóirí éagsúla. Tá tábla san alt a léiríonn go bhfuil staidéar déanta ag an údar a léiríonn na cineálacha éagsúla de chatagóirí i sochaí Hollywood, a roinneann na haisteoirí i róil éagsúla ag brath ar a gcatagóir. Mar shampla I gcomhréir leis an údar, tá cineálacha éagsúla de femininity i scannáin, dílseacht thraidisiúnta lena n-áirítear na mná sean- faisin de ghnáth, a bhaineann i gcónaí leis an smaoineamh teaghlaigh agus leanaí. Ar ndóigh tá an t-alt seo úsáideach agus tá ábharthacht mhór aige ceist an taighde a fhreagairt. Chomh maith leis sin tá na staidéir a rinneadh san alt seo cabhrach, toisc go bhfuil sé ag díriú ar shochaí Hollywood, agus tá an chuid dheireanach den taighde ag díriú ar scannáin Hollywood.<br/><br/>Baineann an t-alt leis an bhforbairt le déanaí chun léiriú a dhéanamh ar fhir-tháirgí grúmaeireachta sa Bhreatain. Trí thagairt fógraí sraith Lynx ar an teilifís i lár na bliana 2000, déanann an t-údar iarracht na téacsanna seo a scrúdú i bhfianaise a gcomhchuibheas nó a ndúshláin sa chóras aireachais.<br/><br/>Runstad, J.K. (n.) Ach ní bheadh ort an Gump chun é a úsáid: Bonnie agus Clyd agus an Réabhlóid Gnéasach<br/><br/>Tugann an t-alt anailís ar an gangster agus scannáin seánra feimineachas agus go háirithe an Bonnie agus Clyde (1967). Cuireann an t-údar dearcadh feimineach a bhaineann leis an carachtar Bonnie, nach bhfuil leisce ar nochtadh a gnéasacht. Mothaíonn an t-údar go n-athraíonn a carachtar cearta na mban chun a mian gnéasach a chur amach.<br/><br/>Cuireann an t-alt stair faoi léiriú na beatha fo-uirbeach i láthair le linn na tréimhse nuair a bhí gluaiseacht feimineach ag a bhuaicphointe. Pléann an t-údar le roinnt róil inscne agus dearcadh daoine faoin ábhar trí léiriú na mílaoise agus na heaspa dídine i scannáin na tréimhse seo. Pléann sé an léiriú ar frustrachas agus ar mhí-úsáid na mná tí fo-uirbeacha lena seasamh sa tsochaí. Nochtann an t-alt freisin meon na bhfear a bhí bainteach le hairgead agus ní bhíonn sé toilteanach teacht amach as a ról firinscneach atá forordaithe go traidisiúnta.<br/><br/>Léiríonn an t-alt coincheap na femininity heigeanómónacha i ndáil le coincheap na firinscneach agus na fir firinscneach ilghéigneach a d’fhorbair Connell (1995, 1987, 1995). Tugann an t-údar léirmhíniú ar mhíthuiscint agus ar femininity heigeanómach agus shades éagsúla laistigh de gach ceann agus freisin a n-imchéim agus a n-iolrach i bhfianaise difríochtaí ranga, cine agus eitneacha.<br/><br/>Cuireann an t-alt dearcadh anailíseach i láthair ar léiriú carachtair baineann sa scannáin Hollywood sa dara feminism tonn. Scrúdaíonn sé an chaoi a ndeachaigh pictiúrlann an phríomhshrutha i ngleic le feimineachas trí shamplaí de scannáin Hollywood lár-seachtacha le téama na feimineach.<br/><br/>Scannáin<br/><br/>Scrúdaíonn an scannán na forbairtí sóisialta atá ar siúl i Meiriceá sna 1950í.Léiríonn sé an streachailt idir mná de mheon traidisiúnta agus liobrálacha maidir le idirdhealú inscne sa tsochaí. Cuireann an scannán léirmhíniú éagsúil ar femininity ar fáil freisin trí dhearcthaí éagsúla.<br/><br/>Is léiriú soiléir é an remake of 1975 bunaidh The Stepford Wives ar an gcumann patriarchal tipiciúil ina bhfuil baineannaigh teoranta do chores laethúil an tsaoil, seachas aire a thabhairt do gach éileamh ar a bhfear céile. Taispeántar iad mar rudaí milis, cineálta, bog-labhartha agus áille nach bhfuil aon uaillmhian agus tuairim phearsanta acu. Léiríonn na fir mar charachtair firinscneach traidisiúnta tipiciúil atá cumhachtach agus nach ligeann dá mná céile iad a shárú in aon ábhar. Téann siad go dtí an méid a a athraíonn siad chuig robots chun a bhfear ego a shásamh.Breithníonn carachtar Joanna i gcoinne na femininity traidisiúnta á gcur ar mhná.Is sampla iontach é an scannán seo de léiriú femininity i scannáin Hollywood.<br/><br/>Mhínigh Bonnie agus Clyde i measc na réabhlóide gnéis a shroich a buaic.An bhean a bhfuil teas agus saoirse gnéasach aici.Ina iarracht chun saol a mhaolú, fásann sí mar shiombail gnéis sa deireadh agus baineann sí clú as an gcró.<br/><br/>Léiríonn an scéal téamaí baininscneach an chomhionannais i ngach gné den saol príobháideach agus poiblí atá i réim sa tréimhse sin i rith na tréimhse sin 1960idí agus sna 1970idí. Léiríonn an scannán turas Alice mar mháthair aonair a fhágtar ina haonar a mac a thógáil gan aon oiliúint ghairmiúil agus oideachas leordhóthanach. Léiríonn an scannán freisin aisling bean a bheith neamhspleách agus uaillmhianta chun go n-éireoidh leis. Léiríonn a dearcadh i leith na Saoirse mianta na mban Meiriceánach atá ag streachailt ar son an chomhionannais agus na saoirse i róil inscne.<br/><br/>Foscríbhinní<br/><br/>Ceistneoir<br/><br/>Cineál A- Open dar críoch<br/><br/>Cad iad na cineálacha comhlachtaí fireann a dhéanann an seó meán?<br/><br/>An gceapann tú go dtéann na híomhánna seo i bhfeidhm go díreach ar dhearcadh na bhfear fúthu féin agus ar an gcaoi a dtugann fireannaigh aire dóibh féin? Mínigh go hachomair iad féin le do thoil.<br/><br/>Cad iad na cineálacha comhlachtaí baineann a dhéanann an seó na meáin?<br/><br/>An gceapann tú go dtéann na híomhánna seo i bhfeidhm go díreach ar dhearcadh na mban fúthu féin agus ar an gcaoi a dtugann mná aire dóibh féin? Mínigh go hachomair iad féin le do thoil.<br/><br/>An meastar gurb iad na híomhánna seo na hidéil inár sochaí?<br/><br/>An bhfuil na híomhánna seo réalaíoch? Cé mhéad duine a chonaic tú cé hiad na cineálacha coirp a chuirtear i láthair sna meáin?<br/><br/>Cad iad na imprisean bréagacha atá forleithne sna meáin faoi fhir agus mhná?<br/><br/>Cé mhéad duine de na scannáin is fearr leat atá le fir mar phríomhcharachtar? Cad iad na teachtaireachtaí a mholann siad faoi thábhacht na bhfear inár sochaí i gcomparáid le mná agus leanaí?<br/><br/>Liostaigh cuid de na róil atá ag mná i scannáin?Conas a dhéanann siad comparáid idir a róil sa domhan "fíor"? Conas a théann siad i bhfeidhm ar d'ionchais maidir le conas a bhíonn mná i ndáiríre ag iompar?<br/><br/>Conas a thaispeánann mná na tréithe i scannáin atá inchomparáide le mná na mban i do shaol féin? Conas a dhéanann siad difriúil?<br/><br/>Ag smaoineamh ar na mná Scannán seo, conas a dhéanann siad tú (más bean thú) a bhraitheann faoi mhná eile?Cé chomh maith is a fheidhmíonn mná i scannáin mar eiseamláirí, mar spéaclaí féachana, nó mar dhaoine a bhaineann le?<br/><br/>Cineál B- Dún dar críoch<br/><br/>Cá bhfuil tú ag breathnú ar na "is fearr" comhlachtaí fireann / baineann an chuid is mó sna meáin? Magazine?? scannáin? Cad iad na cineálacha seónna teilifíse?<br/><br/>An ngníomhaíonn tú uaireanta mar an t-aisteoir/aisteoir is fearr leat i do theach?<br/><br/>An páipéar taighde seo faoi Ról na Meán i leith Tógáil Sóisialta Réaltachta |
| When you're looking to increase muscle size and build strength, you should focus on using more compound strength exercises. Research over time has demonstrated compound exercises are superior compared to other types of exercise. In fact, a 2017 study published in Frontiers in Physiology looked at exercise subjects who used compound versus isolation exercises over an eight-week period. The study showed that the group who focused on compound strength exercises had greater gains in both strength and VO2 max. A second study published in 2019, also supports the use of multi-joint (MJ) over single-joint (SJ) exercises when looking to improve strength in this case, in the lower body. Researchers reported significant strength increases in both SJ and MJ groups, but the MJ group saw significantly greater increases in 1-RM for all leg exercises that were tested in the study.<br/><br/>What Are Compound Strength Exercises?<br/><br/>Compound exercises are multi-joint movements that work several muscles or muscle groups at one time (ACSM). An example would be a Barbell Squat which works many muscle groups like the core, legs, hips and back. Another example would be a Bench Press exercise which works the muscles that make up the chest, shoulders and arms. Compound strength exercises are a staple in many exercise programs because they are ideal for building strength and adding size. In addition, a compound exercise will recruit more muscle fiber and in turn burn more calories per minute than a single-joint or isolation exercise. Compound exercises can be performed using body weight, exercise bands, dumbbells or your best option a barbell. This is because the average gym-goer can lift 20% more weight using a barbell compared to dumbbells. Compound exercise are also important because they mimic activities of daily living (ADL's).<br/><br/>An example of a compound (or multi-joint) exercise: Pull-up<br/><br/>Examples of Compound & Isolation Type Exercises<br/><br/>Compound (Multi-joint) Exercises<br/><br/>Isolation (Single-joint) Exercises<br/><br/>Squat<br/><br/>Leg Extension<br/><br/>Deadlift<br/><br/>Leg Curl<br/><br/>Dips<br/><br/>Tricep Extension<br/><br/>Military Press<br/><br/>Dumbbell Side Lateral Raise<br/><br/>Pull-Ups<br/><br/>Bicep Curl<br/><br/>Bench Press<br/><br/>Dumbbell Chest Fly<br/><br/>What are Isolation Strength Exercises?<br/><br/>Isolation exercises work only one muscle or muscle group and only one joint at a time (ACSM). Examples of isolation exercises include the Biceps Curl or a Leg Extension exercise.<br/><br/>Combining both mult-joint barbell and single-joint dumbbell exercises in a workout has been shown to work well. This type of combination can be seen in the new Jefit program, Compound Strength Routine. Many machine-based strength training products are designed with isolation exercises in mind. Some research has shown, however, that an isolation or single-joint exercise, like a biceps curl, can increase muscle hypertrophy more than a multi-joint exercise.<br/><br/>An example of an isolation (or single-joint) exercise: Bicep Curl<br/><br/>Jefit's New Compound Strength Routine<br/><br/>A new advanced strength program designed around multi-joint exercises is the Jefit Compound Strength Routine. The 3-day, advanced, strength training program includes 9-10 strength exercises in each workout. The routine offers three different strength programs, using barbell and dumbbells, and includes 1-3 supersets in each exercise session. This type of program design makes for a faster workout and in turn keeps all the session times less than an hour.<br/><br/>To wrap things up, please read this great list of guidelines from strength expert, Charles Poliquin, that discusses the pro/con of using both compound and isolation type exercises. It's definitely worth a read. Be well and stay strong!<br/><br/>We all know that exercise is like medicine for the body. There are times though when you just want to move through your workout in minimal time. This where a good strength and cardio circuit comes into play. This is why circuit training is so efficient, it combines the perfect blend of strength and cardio in minimal time. The end result is usually the same, a great full-body workout and a body covered in sweat!<br/><br/>The cool thing about circuit programs are: they're fast, fun and very effective at getting results. You never get bored because there are so many design options for a circuit routine. The featured strength & cardio circuit can now be found on the Jefit app.<br/><br/>What is Circuit Training?<br/><br/>Circuit training is training method that alternates between several exercises (usually 4 to 12) that target different muscle groups. A plan can even use different movement patterns (like push, pull, press, carry, etc.). The design of the program enables someone to move from exercise to exercise with minimal or no rest depending on their fitness level. Some of the many benefits of regular circuit training include improvements in body composition, muscular strength/endurance and aerobic capacity.<br/><br/>What is Interval Training?<br/><br/>Interval training, on the other hand, alternates between periods of moderate-to-high-intensity work with brief periods of active or passive rest. The main difference between circuit training and interval training is not what you're doing but rather the intensity of the work being done. You have probably heard about HIIT (high-intensity interval training) before or seen it in some of the workout titles on the Jefit app.<br/><br/>Equipment Need: Jump Rope, Weight Plate and Dumbbells<br/><br/>Circuit Design: UB/LB/Core/Cardio Sequence<br/><br/>The circuit session begins with four exercises group together following a brief warm-up. The session design alternates between an upper body exercise, a lower body exercise, and a core exercise before transitioning to cardio for 1-2 minutes. The program features 20 exercises (including four for warm-up) that comprise four rounds of "mini" circuits with four exercises in each group.<br/><br/>Here is what each of the four circuits (after the warm-up) look like in this latest Jefit circuit workout:<br/><br/>I have personally been doing circuits for many years now and, like a lot of people, working through one never seems to gets old. In any event, circuits are fun and get great results, so why not give one a try for your next workout?<br/><br/>The majority of people who exercise or engage in individual or team sports often looks for ways to improve performance. With that, brings us to how we can better "hack" our body to improve performance, some also call this DIY science….biohacking. Dave Asprey, a biohacker who created the company Bulletproof, defines biohacking as "the art and science of changing the environment around you and inside you so that you have full control over your own biology."<br/><br/>Why Try to Hack Your Body Anyway?<br/><br/>There are many people out there who try to hack their body to improve performance, on some level. They do this basically because they have a strong desire to feel better and to see just how far they can push the human body. A lot of people are hacking their body essentially to try and live as long as possible. Dave Asprey as an example, has been quoted as saying he wants to live to 180 years old.<br/><br/>Another well-known body or bio hacker is Tim Ferris, author of the best-selling book, The 4-Hour Body. Ferris has a well known reputation for trying to hack just about everything related to his body. Why does he do it? This Wired interview explains why.<br/><br/>Now that you have a better understanding of what trying to hack your body is all about, check this out.<br/><br/>Mindful breath work effects everything from mediation to sports performance.<br/><br/>Breath Work: An Easy Way to Improve Performance<br/><br/>We all know how to breath intuitively and how importance breathing is since it gives us life. Go beyond this for a moment and listen to this great Wild Ideas podcast from REI. The podcast, comes out every other Monday, and just featured author, James Nestor, author a new book, Breath: The New Science of a Lost Art. The book comes out in May. The podcast talked about his years of doing research and talking to medical experts on the science of breathing. He offers up some great easy-to-follow tips that you can use right now. I actually tried his 6-second breath technique on my morning walk today. You can try this when seated (or like me, walking). Take in a long, slow breath through your nose only, for 5-6 seconds. Then exhale slowly for the same amount of time and try this for about 6 repetitions. The goal of this type of breathing, is to help more nitric oxide enter your body and tissues. It's been reported that when you breathe through your nose, nasal resistance increases by 200% and this helps the release of oxygen. If you were wondering, mouth breathing does not let your body take advantage of the sinuses production of nitric oxide.<br/><br/>Nasal Versus Mouth Breathing<br/><br/>Try closing your mouth and just breath slowly in/out through your nose for about minute. According to a lot of the science out there, "breathing through your nose is one of the most beneficial things you can do for the overall health of your body and for your longevity." This is what Nestor talks about in his book and in the podcast. You may already know the value of breath work, if you practice yoga on a regular basis. Think about this for a minute. How great would it be if we could get a legitimate boost in performance by simply breathing slowly through our nose? Listen to the podcast and give it a shot. For additional reading, check this great article out on the science of breathing by Sarah Novotny and Len Kravitz, Ph.D. and this research paper on effects of nasal breathing in runners.<br/><br/>There are many experts and researchers who think breath work should become a component in health & fitness model. Meaning, you work on strength, flexibility, cardio, nutrition, etc. – why not also incorporate breath work as part of your daily routine?<br/><br/>Mobility: Unlock Tight Hips to Improve Performance<br/><br/>We typically spend a great deal of our time in the gym pushing weights or doing cardio. One key area that often gets overlooked is mobility. Mobility can be defined as freedom of movement without pain through a full range of motion. Mobility exercises can be done as a warm-up if you're always rushed for time. They are great for reducing joint pain, improving a fuller range of motion and can even reduce the chance of injury. We all know tight muscles and connective tissue are an accident waiting to happen.<br/><br/>When you want to squat, lunge, or lift weights better, mobility work is key, especially when it comes to the hips. You may have limited hip mobility because of an old injury, you don't work on mobility or you may sit or drive all day for work. In any event, tight hips can cause, over time, a chain reaction resulting in dysfunctional movement. Over time your hip joints will become tight if not addressed appropriately, you'll begin to notice issues when performing exercises like Squats and Deadlifts.<br/><br/>What are Some of the Better Hip Exercises to do?<br/><br/>There are a lot of different directions you could go here. This is an opportunity to use the Jefit app and perform this series of exercises. Complete each exercise below slowly, working through a full range of motion. Perform each exercise as a hip and glute warm-up prior to working out and you'll eventually see an improvement in hip mobility. Some may not be pure hip mobility drills but doing these will in turn improve glute/hip function. Perform each exercise for 30-seconds then move to the next and repeat the circuit twice.<br/><br/>No one needs to tell us that we're currently living in unprecedented times. The health of everyone in this country, and worldwide for that matter, is at the forefront of all our minds. It is more important than ever to attempt to follow a healthy lifestyle. How do you know if you're living a healthy lifestyle in the first place? Harvard Health reports you're considered healthy if you can answer "yes" to all the following criteria. (1) healthy diet, (2) healthy body weight, (3) never smoked, (4) consume moderate amounts of alcohol and (5) exercise regularly.<br/><br/>What's Considered a Healthy Lifestyle?<br/><br/>According to Harvard Health, one important component to this type of lifestyle is a healthy diet. Meaning, an "intake of healthy foods like vegetables, fruits, nuts, whole grains, healthy fats, and omega-3 fatty acids". In addition, avoid unhealthy foods like "processed meats, sugar-sweetened beverages, trans fat, and sodium." No smoking in a no-brainer. A healthy body weight according to the site, is a body mass index (BMI), between 18.5 and 24.9. But to be honest, this is not the best metric to monitor, instead focus on your percent body fat. On the alcohol side, no more than one drink/day/women and two drinks/day/men. A healthy physical activity level means roughly 30-minutes of moderate to vigorous activity most days of the week.<br/><br/>Does Living a Healthy Lifestyle Actually Add Years to Your Life?<br/><br/>The research does in fact demonstrate that living a healthy lifestyle can add years to your life. Individuals who met the criteria for all five habits (listed above) enjoyed living longer lives than those who had none: 14 years for women and 12 years for men to be exact. People who had none of these habits "were far more likely to die prematurely from cancer or cardiovascular disease." There is also additional research that reports similar findings to this in the Journal of American Medical Association.<br/><br/>Are you getting a minimum of 30-minutes of moderate or vigorous activity most days of the week?<br/><br/>You probably have the exercise piece down already, especially if you're using the Jefit app to help record and track your workouts. Here are some additional ways to move towards a healthy lifestyle, in addition to the five criteria mentioned in the research studies above.<br/><br/>10 Ways to Help You Live Better and Longer<br/><br/>Exercise<br/><br/>Burn 1,100 Calories a Week. Duke University scientists discovered that this amount of calories expended from exercise prevents the accumulation of visceral adipose tissue (fat). This type of belly fat causes arterial inflammation and hypertension. Are you falling short of this number? Try joining a sports a league. One study reported that people who exercised in groups boosted their average weekly calorie burn by 500 a week.<br/><br/>Hit the Weights. University of Michigan scientists found that people who completed three strength workouts/week for two months lowered their diastolic blood pressure by an average of eight points. That's enough to reduce the risk of stroke by 40% and heart attack by 15%.<br/><br/>Find the Time to Exercise. People who exercise for 2 hours/week are less likely to feel stressed than their sedentary counterparts, say researchers from Denmark.<br/><br/>Get on Those Daily Chores. Doing 150 calories' worth of chores a day can lower blood pressure by 13 points, according to Medicine & Science in Sports & Exercise. The reduction lasts only 8 hours, but make it a daily habit and you can lower your blood pressure in the long term.<br/><br/>Diet & Nutrition<br/><br/>Drink Five 8-Ounce Glasses of Water a Day. Those drinking this amount of H2O were 54% less likely to suffer a fatal heart attack compared to people who drank two glasses a day.<br/><br/>Try a Natural Remedy. Israeli scientists found eating one grapefruit a day lowers cholesterol by 20% even in people who don't respond to statins.<br/><br/>Cut Down on Sweets. Tufts University researchers found low-sugar diets had lower levels of depression and anxiety than those who consumed all types of carbohydrates. The happier people also limited their total carbohydrate intake to 40% of their daily total calories.<br/><br/>Indulge Your Chocolate Craving. A 15-year study by Dutch scientists found men who ate 4 grams of cocoa/day had half the risk of dying from heart disease than those who ate less. That's the equivalent of two 25-calorie Hershey Kisses – an amount that can fit into any diet.<br/><br/>Hopefully this article has offered you a little more insight on what constitutes a healthy lifestyle. If so, maybe you feel like you're more equipped now to live a more healthy, sustainable lifestyle. Continue to focus on improving your mind body & spirit a bit more each day. Be Well and Stay Strong!<br/><br/>The benefits of strength training performed on a regularly basis are well documented in scientific literature, magazines and on the web. There are many digital health & fitness companies who have apps that enable you to build strength training programs. With so much information coming your way, what type of program is actually best at helping you get results? In this case, when talking about results, we're referring to gains in both strength and muscle development.<br/><br/>Take a look at the following 5×5 split routine found on the Jefit app. This particular weight lifting program was designed as a 3-day routine. Keep in mind, there are many other split routines you can find that offer 4-6 days versus 3-days.<br/><br/>Program Design: 5×5 Split Routine (3-Days)<br/><br/>All strength training sessions follow a 5×5 format using only two body parts to keep session times under an hour. The workout time range for the 3-day program was between 36 and 56 minutes. The recovery time between sets is a very important training variable that needs to be manipulated depending on load (sets x reps x weight). Adequate recovery is important in order to push that next heavy set. A key point to remember, using a short rest period of one-minute between sets means the muscle is only about 80% recovered. I used a 2:00 recovery time between most of the sets for this reason. That may have to increase if someone is using very heavy weight for all their exercises.<br/><br/>The routine gets its unique name from "splitting" up specific muscle groups and associating those body segments to different days of the week. The idea behind the design of this routine was to couple a leg day with pulling movements that overload the back on Day 1. The second day includes push movements that target the chest with a pull and push for the arms. On day 3 you have pressing movements that target the shoulders with a few core exercises. This routine is only a snapshot for one-week of training.<br/><br/>The 5×5 program used the following 3-day split format over the course of a week:<br/><br/>Legs & Back (4 exercises) – Day 1<br/><br/>Chest & Arms (4 exercises) – Day 2<br/><br/>Shoulders & Core (5 exercises) – Day 3<br/><br/>Sets & Reps Scheme<br/><br/>Be realistic when designing any exercise program regarding the number of sets and repetition you use. More is not always better. Different exercises, sets, repetitions and recovery time will effect both short and long-term outcomes. Using a 5×5 setup gives you 25 repetitions per exercise and two movements per body part brings that repetition total to 50. That is more than enough to overload a muscle using a 5-RM. Many programs out there, when looking at sets and repetitions, equate to unrealistic expectations regarding length of workout. A repetition goal of 25-50 is more than enough to stimulate muscle growth, as long as you're using a 5-RM. Here is a nice article on how to perform a 5-RM bench press test.<br/><br/>There are four important design elements regarding this particular 5×5 split routine. They are: (1) the use of compound movements, (2) large muscle groups, (3) the use of 5-RM on all exercises, and (4) sufficient recovery time. A 5×5 split routine is popular and has been shown to build strength and muscle size over time. Special emphasis should be placed on your 5-RM in this strength training routine. During anytime in the program, if you're able to surpass five repetitions for any exercise – that's right – you need to increase the weight. If for example, an exercise on your "core" day (see below) is too light – then hold a weight plate or wear a weighted vest (if available) to challenge yourself more. See the design and layout below.<br/><br/>I hope you enjoy the program. If you have any questions on this particular 5×5 Split Routine (3-day), now featured on Jefit app, or any other program for that matter, please reach out to me in the comment section on this blog or our online community via the app. Here is some additional reading that you may find interesting on the topic of strength training. Be well and stay strong!<br/><br/>There is nothing more upsetting than not getting results after dedicating yourself to dieting and exercise over the course of a few months! You pushed the weights regularly, did cardio and improved your diet, but in the end, there was still that unwanted layer of body fat covering your abs. It may have been because you did not focus enough on controlling one very important item…added sugar.<br/><br/>Are Doing Sit-ups Enough?<br/><br/>The answer to that question is NO. A study done in 1984 at the University of Massachusetts looked at various fitness outcomes of subjects who performed 5,000 sit-ups over the course of a month. Performing hundreds of sit-ups on a daily basis wasn't enough to lose abdominal fat. The subjects, a group of college students, had body measurements taken as well as a painful muscle biopsy procedure. The subjects body fat didn't change and not even an inch was lost around the abdominal area by the end of the study. In the end, they had much stronger abs but their body fat and girth remained unchanged.<br/><br/>Many factors can influence the way you look and feel on a daily basis as well as over the course of your lifetime. A healthy, sustainable lifestyle also plays a huge part in how lean you ultimately get. You have probably heard that genetics are also important. True. Don't forget about physical activity (in and out of the gym), this plays a significant role too. The missing "ingredient" in most exercise plans though is cutting back and monitoring added sugar.<br/><br/>What is Your DASI? Daily Added Sugar Intake<br/><br/>The term, DASI, is an acronym that I coined and stands for daily added sugar intake. It's an important component of any nutrition program and it's a game changer for those looking to get ripped. For the majority of people, getting a lean, ripped mid-section will be a lifelong challenge. Some never seem to realize that how they fuel their body in turn effects their midsection and abdominal area. This goes well beyond doing a daily plank challenge. Learn from the story of the UMass college students.<br/><br/>Follow These 3-Steps to Get Strong, Ripped Abs<br/><br/>Beware of added sugar in all foods and drinks. How? Start reading food labels and keep track of your daily added sugar. Put yourself on a sugar budget. Eat no more than 150 calories of added sugar a day for men. That's about 38 grams a day for men and 100 calories or 25 grams a day for women. Carbohydrates (sugar) contain 4 calories per gram. There are two types of sugars, natural sugar and added sugar. Added sugar is hidden in just about everything we eat and drink. Examples of natural sugar are milk and fruit, and unlike added sugar, they contain more fiber, vitamins and minerals. Added sugar has minimal nutrients, basically no fiber, and can quickly raise blood sugar levels like all fast food or junk food.<br/><br/>Add a weekly HIIT session on the cardio side, in addition to your weekly strength training sessions. Do this by adding intervals into a cardio session with bouts of hard work followed by brief periods of recovery and repeat several times. A whole cardio session could be an interval-based workout for 15-20 minutes or you can periodically add it to the cardio work you're doing now. Any type of cardio will do the trick from jogging to rowing.<br/><br/>1-RM Test. Push your strength training workouts. Use one day to determine a new 1-RM (one repetition maximum) involving all your major exercises, like bench press, shoulder press and squat and do a reset on your current program. This can be done every 12-weeks.<br/><br/>Changing things up from what you had been doing is a great way to stimulate not only your body but also your mind. Finally, incorporating the three tips above into your new routine, will definitely move you in the right direction of getting the long wanted ripped abs. Use the Jefit app to help track your progress and keep you moving toward your goals. Remember, you don't own it until you right down or record it, so use the app. Good luck Stay Strong!<br/><br/>It seems like every time we pick up a magazine or surf the web we're overwhelmed with outlandish weight-loss claims. Let's do a reset on this for 2020 and change the narrative. Rather than focus on weight loss like so many of us do, let's start looking more at our percent body fat level. Do you know what your current body fat level is? You should know this number and monitor it over time.<br/><br/>The ideal body fat percentage for an adult varies depending on the age of the individual. Other variables that also come into play are gender, genetics, bone structure and their exercise level. College-age men typically carry 15% body fat while women have 23%, keep in mind that these numbers are for non-athletes.<br/><br/>Stepping onto a bathroom scale does not tell you the real story about your overall health. Your body weight is not as important as how much body fat you're carrying. Once you can determine your body fat level, you then have a better understanding of the ratio of muscle to fat that you have.<br/><br/>For example, a women who weights 145 pounds and 33% body fat, can calculate that she has 48 pound of fat and 97 pounds of muscle, bone and fluid. A male, who is 205 pounds and has 25% body fat can determine he is carrying 51 pounds of fat weight and about 154 pounds of muscle, bone and fluid. Once this is known, you can start using the Jefit app to keep track of how this number changes over time. In both of these cases, the goal would be to lose fat weight while maintaining or gaining muscle, depending of course what the goals are.<br/><br/>Monitoring your body fat is important, and in turn, offers great insight into the status of your overall health & fitness. As you see, it's a valuable metric to follow and offers insight into understanding if a particular strength training program is actually working.<br/><br/>The at-home workout program has unexpectedly become the new norm due to area gyms closing as a result of COVID-19. A by-product of this is that we are spending more of our time inside. Many are now wondering how we can take our old workout plan we did at the gym and incorporate it into a new home routine?<br/><br/>Now that we are home-based, there seems to be additional questions we need to think about and work around. In addition to the question above, there are other matters to worry about too, like when you're going to exercise, space availability, and equipment needs.<br/><br/>Approaching Your At-Home Workout Program Differently<br/><br/>A paradigm shift is a "a fundamental change in approach or underlying assumptions." This may be a perfect time to start thinking differently about how we exercise at home, meaning, how we structure and execute our training routine. Change can be a very good thing when it comes to an individuals body and how that body adapts and progresses during a training cycle.<br/><br/>5 Basic Human Movement Patterns<br/><br/>Whether your training plan is geared towards a full-body, split routine or circuit-training, should not be the focus. What really matters most is training movements not muscles. Do not rely on specific exercises, instead, make sure you add-in specific movement patterns during each training session. Movement patterns are exercise classifications and can be thought of as the movement direction of the exercise. There are different schools of thought on how these movement patterns are categorized and even talked about.<br/><br/>The following is a modified version of some of the basic human movement patterns that should be included in the design of any training program. This list could also include other categories like hip dominant, knee dominant, rotational and anti-rotational categories. For the purposes of this article though, we will refer to the following five basic categories.<br/><br/>Squat<br/><br/>Any variation of a Squat is considered one of the best compound movements you can do. Exercises listed in this category are considered hip or knee-dominant by some. You can think of this category as exercises that utilize muscles around the hip and knee, like a Barbell Squat, Dumbbell Squat, or a Goblet Squat, as examples.<br/><br/>Hip Hinge<br/><br/>This particular category of exercises consists of movements that involve a "hinging" motion at the hip joint, and have little to no movement at the knee. Classic examples of exercises that incorporate a hip hinge are a Kettlebell Swing and a Romanian Deadlift.<br/><br/>Hip Hinge Category: Kettlebell Swing exercise<br/><br/>Pull: Vertical & Horizontal<br/><br/>The vertical pull includes moving a weight or body weight vertically, relative to the position that your body is in. Examples of these types exercises would include Pull-ups and Lat Pull-down.<br/><br/>The horizontal pull include any exercise that moves the weight toward your body horizontally. A few examples include: Bent-over Rows, Inverted Row or a Seated Row.<br/><br/>Push: Vertical & Horizontal<br/><br/>This category combines both vertical and horizontal in order to make life easier for you. The vertical push, includes exercises that move a load or weight vertically in relation to the torso, like a Military Press or Push Press.<br/><br/>Horizontal push is a category of exercises that involves moving a weight straight out in front of you, away from the body, like a Bench Press.<br/><br/>Weighted Carry<br/><br/>Many strength and conditioning experts agree that a Weighted Carry is the best, all-in-one exercise a person can do. The Carry is ideal for increasing overall strength, especially back, core and grip strength. The exercise benefits don't stop there though; it's also ideal for improving stamina and functionality. A simple definition of a Weighted Carry is picking up a weight or a load and carrying it for distance or time. The best exercise example is a Farmer's Carry.<br/><br/>The importance of adding these five movement patterns into your at-home workout program is invaluable. It offers someone a better way to design and customize their training program to meet all their needs. It also assures that an individual will work through the various planes of motion more often during training compared to a traditional training plan. The benefits of focusing on movement patterns instead of working specific muscles ensures a well-balanced, strong, functional body.<br/><br/>Exercise Program Design<br/><br/>Now that you have a better understanding of movement patterns, it's important to use them in your next at-home workout. To experience measurable gains with your at-home training program, it's important that you understand the basic concept of periodization.<br/><br/>"Periodization is an organized approach to training that involves progressive cycling of various aspects of a training program during a specific period of time."Len Kravitz, PhD<br/><br/>To get the most benefit out of any at-home workout program, a periodized training plan should be followed. This is where adjusting the various training variables over time (i.e. sets/reps/rest/load/time under tension) comes into play. The idea is to control these variables during each training day and over the course of a full training year. By following such a training format over time, you'll ensure maximal gains long-term, safely and effectively. Think about that for a moment. If you have not had strength gains in a while, maybe a lack of periodization is the culprit?<br/><br/>It seems like the whole world is now moving life indoors due to COVID-19. The new playground for families and individuals has transitioned from outdoors to inside the home. You can take advantage of this opportunity in the coming months by taking back control of your health and fitness. We may not be able to control certain outcomes regarding the coronavirus, but what we can control, is our overall health and wellbeing during this stressful time. One of the first steps down this path is making the commitment to work out regularly at home.<br/><br/>Make Working Out at Home a Priority<br/><br/>Exercise for most people is never a priority. There is now plenty of time to workout even with the kids stuck inside and you working remotely. The average adult still spends too much of their time sedentary, according to research from theJournal of the American Medical Association. Those numbers are going to potentially increase with COVID-19 lingering for the coming months. The goal is to find a time to exercise that works best for you and your schedule; maybe it's in the morning, after work, or small bouts throughout the day. Check out the following suggestions to make your workout from home a good overall experience:<br/><br/>Schedule your workout each day as an appointment and put into into your calendar or smartphone and set a daily reminder.<br/><br/>Morning workouts are a great way to start the day off right and it puts you in a great mood once you're done by releasing endorphins.<br/><br/>Turn your workout routine into a habit by staying on track by "just "doing it" for the next 3-weeks. Daily exercise should eventually become part of your lifestyle like eating or brushing your teeth. It needs to become part of your regular day.<br/><br/>Make it social (make it a family affair, join your spouse or get the kids involved if need be).<br/><br/>Do a periodic self-assessment to track progress and keep you motivated. Keep track of particular strength gains, body composition changes, etc. You can test yourself, for example, every 4, 8, or 12-weeks and document it using the Jefit app.<br/><br/>Home Equipment Options<br/><br/>There are many different roads someone could travel down when looking at options to meet all their exercise needs. There are now a variety of virtual classes on everything from yoga to HIT classes but many include costly monthly subscriptions. We have taken all the guess work out of deciding what you need in terms of getting started. The following article, published on the Jefit blog, offers the best exercise equipment options on a budget.<br/><br/>Your Assistant Coach: the Jefit App<br/><br/>The JeFit app makes thousands of strength training routines accessible. It comes with a customizable workout planner, an extensive exercise library, and a members-only Facebook group page. You can choose new workouts and track your progress with the app so that you can see how close you are to your fitness goals.<br/><br/>Don't forget to join the Jefit community so that you can be a part of it too!<br/><br/>We are currently living in very turbulent times, and now more than ever, the benefits of choosing the best home gym equipment goes beyond increasing just strength. We are hearing, thinking, and reading more and more about the growing COVID-19 outbreak. It looks like living with the coronavirus will be the new norm for a while and it's enough to raise anyone's stress level. A continued, elevated stress level, coupled with no exercise could potentially suppress your immune system.<br/><br/>Benefits of Having a Home Gym<br/><br/>One of the best and safest options you have for getting in great shape is doing it right from the comfort of your own home or apartment. Not to mention, this seems to be a no-brainer with COVID-19 hanging around for months to come. In addition to the many health & safety benefits, there is also an associated cost savings resulting from your gym temporarily closing.<br/><br/>Cost Savings Benefit<br/><br/>You do not have to spend a ton of money setting up your home gym. There are many different pieces of equipment you could use but it will depend first on budget and then on availability of space and of course training experience. Let's assume that space, budget and experience are somewhat limited.<br/><br/>Exercise Equipment Needs<br/><br/>The following lists include multiple options for exercise products that are ideal for home use and can be purchased online. Each list offers versatile equipment, and is practical in terms of staying within a budget.<br/><br/>You can take care of your equipment needs while the Jefit team can help in terms of finding the best strength-training routines to help you get started.<br/><br/>Home Gym Option #1<br/><br/>Stability Ball<br/><br/>This product reaches far beyond just sitting on it for basic core work. Try lying in a supine position with your feet on the ball. Engage your core and raise your buttock off the floor, pause, and return to your starting position. Following a set of hip extension, perform the same movement with your feet on the ball and knees bent. Lift your buttock off the floor and hold in a bridge position, slowly lower and repeat. After completing these two movements, start in the same position but this time pull both feet in towards your buttock, performing a leg curl movement.<br/><br/>Foam Roller<br/><br/>If you're not rolling out on a regular basis, then you should honestly start. There are many benefits of adding in a few minutes of foam rolling before and even after your exercise session. Maintaining healthy fascia should be top of mind for you. Remember, restriction (i.e., connective/muscle tissue) is associated with disfunction and this can lead to a limited range of motion; and yes, this will eventually effect your performance.<br/><br/>Exercise Bands<br/><br/>Regular band work can be ideal for any exercise level. Bands are great to utilize in circuit-type exercise routines or as part of your dynamic warm-up. Different colored bands typically equate with different intensity levels. These are very inexpensive to purchase and can be brought anywhere for an exercise session.<br/><br/>Medicine Ball<br/><br/>This is another great tool for your exercise toolbox, if used correctly. It's ideal for adding resistance to various moves like squats, lunges or a step-up with a shoulder press. In the hands of the right person, a medicine ball can be a welcome addition to any home gym.<br/><br/>Jump Rope<br/><br/>One of the best forms of cardio exercise you can do is jumping rope. It's great for elevating your heart rate and easy to transition to – so it's ideal for any circuit-type or HIIT training program at home.
