Environmental Sustainability Environmental sustainability in tourism requires greater attention and knowledge about the impacts and ways of translating those impacts into the economic marketplace. The tourist, or service provider in the tourism industry have to understand their responsibilities such as disturbing the natural life cycles so for this reason government legislation should be there in system that in case of failure to abide by those systems (Cooper et al., 2008). Further there is need to calculate carrying capacities, it is an important method of assessing environmental impact and sustainability (Maldonado et al. 1992 cited in Mowforth and Munt 2009). Social sustainability Social sustainability is a ability of a community, may local or national, to understand changes such as excess tourists, for short or long term and continuing functioning either without the creation of social disharmony as a result of these contribution or by settling its functions and relationships so that the conflict created can be improve or mitigated (Mowforth and Munt 2009). As per the Cooper et al., (2008) that tourists who do not want to adapt at all will always create negative impacts on the local community. So to avoid it tourist who may be through natural interest where the concerned visitor intrigued by local customs and behaviour so they go to scrutinize and that inspection can set in movement of a commercialisation process that will sooner or later change the events. Cultural sustainability Travel can change persons life through its visits to various parts of the world and more interaction between the local people of the destinations. It helps to develop the understanding about the tourist destination and its culture of the local people. But some time the relationships within particular society, the mores of interaction, the lifestyle, the customs and traditions are all subjectively means of exchange. Even its culture may be irreversibly altered. Culture is a dynamic a feature of human life as in the society, community and economy; so then it can be assume that changes in culture not always welcome in to the society. That means sometime it creates negative effects. But, the cultural sustainability refers to the ability of people to maintain or understand the elements of their culture which distinguished them from others people (Mowforth and Munt, 2009). According the definition that destination has made by manmade borders, so here every destination has its own administrative as well as managing style. This includes the rules and regulation of the town, city, states, countries and all worlds to sustain the balance of Environmental, economic, social and cultural sustainability. So, the role of government and private organization to make strategies and policies is to keep engaging and motivating the participants on long term basis such as government stakeholders, private organizations, and other local authorities also the NGOs in to development of the tourism product. Due to the vast nature of the industry it involves wide-ranging of operations, decisions and planning area with understanding sustainability and non sustainability and the requirements of tourist destinations, its consumer and suppliers such as tourism intermediaries and others like infrastructure developers and legal procedures such as visa and tourists destination manag ement, its statistics of visitors and economy which circulate by the tourism industry (Prugh et al., 2000). The destination which I have taken that is Maharashtra state of India. So first of all according to definition of destination need to understand geography of Maharashtra. Maharashtra is a state which located in the western part of India. It is the second most populous and third largest state by area in India. There is a huge tourism potential available in Maharashtra due to its culture and vide range of geographical area. The borders of Maharashtra is the Arabian Sea to the west of India with a 720 km long coastline along the lush green Konkan region, nestled Sahyadri mountain range are several hill stations and water reservoirs with semi-evergreen and deciduous forests. Gujarat and the Union territory of Dadra and Nagar Haveli to the northwest, Madhya Pradesh to the northeast, Chhattisgarh to the east, Karnataka to the south, Andhra Pradesh to the southeast,  Goa which is the part of Maharashtra it has located at the southwest it is a famous holiday spot in the world it is well known by its various beaches. Vasco da Gama sailed down at Malabar Coast in 1948. The Goas economy is solely depending on the tourism. Maharashtra state covers an area of 307,731 km2 (118,816 sq mi) or 9.84% of the total geographical area of India. Mumbai, the capital city of the state, is Indias largest city and the financial capital of the nation. Marathi is the mother tongue of Maharashtra (Govt. of Maharashtra, 2006). It is also the richest state in India, contributing to 15% of the countrys industrial output and 13.2% of its GDP in year 2005-06. History The name Maharashtra also appeared in a 7th century inscription and in the account of a Chinese traveller Hiuen-Tsang, was a famous Chinese Buddhist monk, scholar, traveller, and translator that brought up the interaction between China and India in the early Tang period. The potential available at Maharashtra that it has four world cultural heritage sites as first two located in the Sahyadri Mountain Range these are 1) Ajanta caves 2) Ellora caves at Aurangabad and 3) Elephanta caves at the Elephanta Island at the Mumbai. And the newly inscribed site is Chhatrapati Shivaji Terminus (CST) before it was known as Victoria Terminus (VT) (MTDC, 2010). Bhandardara is noted place for trekking place of Maharashtra followed by Pratapgarh near Mahabaleshwar, Torna near Bhor and Panhala near Kolhapur. Also Sahyadri ranges provide about 7 to 8 trekking cites which has around Pune, Satara, Lonavala and other places. And the rock climbing at Karla Mountains, believed to be dating back to 160 BC. It is home to the huge cluster of Chaitya caves (Planning commission of India, 2007). The water sport activity available at Panshet Aqua Sports centres 40 km drive from Pune, such as windsurfing, speed boating, kayaking, water scooters etc. Close to Mumbai, Esselworld at Gorai is an amusement park which has roller coasters and water slides. Also the Sailing which is most popular in India available at Mumbai and Pune, in Maharashtra, sailing equipments are available only at the Khadakvasla Lake in Pune. Currently, MTDC has started the Scuba and Snorkelling diving school in the water of Arabian Sea at Konkan (MTDC, 2010). Before propose, justify and to defend strategy for the chosen destination, require a SWOT analysis of destination internally as well externally (Tribe, 2003). Then it is easy to understand the nature of competitiveness and threats among the four pillar of sustainability. The analysis involves consideration of the major influences upon the tourist destination success in terms of: resources and environment (Tribe, 2003). So according to this, the analysis of Maharashtras tourism sector is also based on national and global factor as resources and environmental consideration. SWOT analysis of Maharashtra (Govt of India, 2007): Strength available in Maharashtra Maharashtra has immense potential with natural beaches, heritage and culture. Mumbai is comparatively higher in strength of Maharashtra States. It is commercial as well as entertainment capital of India. Recently, the achievement by A. R. Rehman from Slumdog millionaire movie, It has received a prime interest to population of Indian origin in the source of market of USA and UK. Mumbai has an international airport brings about 26 per cent of most of the international tourists. Also, it has advantage of getting most of the tourist to the state before any other states in India. Further, in Agricultural tourism wine tourism now in boom. Because of The international level research institute and providing a better knowledge about the agricultural products which includes export quality product to other countries and how to sustain the farmers land to grow well crops in future. While considering health Medical tourism also in budding stage in metro cities. Weakness in Tourism of Maharashtra Every tourism require tourist for its growth so, the tourism industry in Maharashtra is highly depend on the long haul market include USA, UK, France and Germany. Secondly, the host ambience; when tourist arrived in Mumbai they experience that the condition of western highway is poor, ample amount of advertisement boards and then on the road beggars this all creates a very poor host ambience the reason behind it is population of Mumbai about is approximately 13,788,305. Thirdly, destination transits status shows that only 5-8 per cent out of 50 per cent of international tourist who visits to India is ready to travel to Maharashtras destination. The reason behind it the Safety and security concerns and poor marketing campaign available around India and other countries. Fourthly, unfocused development and lack of co-ordination between MTDC (Maharashtra Tourism Development and Corporation), ITDC (Indian Tourism Development Corporation) and IRCTC (Indian Railway and Catering Tourism Corporation) etc. have followed their own objectives and plans and are working on separate platform. Lack of co-operation between various governmental organization involved in tourism creates inconvenience to the tourist. For example : A visit to Ajanta World heritage site requires a tourist to purchase as many as 7 tickets due to a distinct jurisdiction issue.(Planning Commission of India, 2007). And Deccan Odyssey Luxury train which serves 7 tourist destinations in Maharashtra has getting less revenue, because of poor marketing strategies and promotions from various tourist information Kiosk available in Maharashtra and other part of India. Opportunities to sustain tourism in Maharashtra Due to 9/11 terrorist attack, the domestic tourism growth has increased. Maharashtra Government undertaking initiatives to attract domestic tourism as a tourism strategy. Secondly, Indian governments Golden Quadrilateral Highway project is now in last stage to connect North- South, East-west corridors by the National highways, and is expected to increase accessibilities in domestic tourism (GoI, 2002). The growing tourism source countries of Japan, China and Sri Lanka have Buddhist populations (Buddha Dharma Education Association) their interest is in Buddhist architecture and heritage is a great opportunity for Maharashtra to offer then its unique Cave Architecture. Thirdly, the nature of tourist market in Mumbai, the high spending business and leisure tourists mostly from East European countries affects on the market. The available outbound market is China. Threats which affects to sustain competitive tourism in Maharashtra Maharashtra had significant threats in last decade that all affect on the tourism of Maharashtra. The series of incidents as bomb blast in 1993 target was Hotels and tourists attraction, train bomb blast 2006 and then at the end terrorist attack on 26th to 29th November 2008 on Hotel Trident, The Taj Mahal Palace and Tower, and Chhatrapati Shivaji Terminals in Mumbai. Secondly, the competitor of it started Economic Impact assessment working with the help of WTO and WTTC, Kerala has already started their vision 2025 to sustain their development growth in tourism. Thirdly, the most competition can be seen in Heritage tourism, beach tourism, back water sport and special interest tourism. Cultural sustainability and strategies in Maharashtra: Under the cultural tourism strategy of Maharashtra the government considered that it has distinctive aspects of its rich culture and tradition would be identified and promoted as an integral part of Maharashtras tourism. To Identify and promote the states folk arts and organize folk dance and music programmes at tourist destinations (Govt of Maharashtra 2006). But to sustain it there is less financial support to those participants in to the entertainment field. The financial support is not on time they need to wait sanction the amount from government. Currently, there is a lot of attention to Bollywood artist, so here it can be seen that celebrities has taken over on Maharashtras culture such as following dress sense of Hollywood actresses is now seen in metro cities. There is still no any specific step has been taken by any of the entertainment industry to give chance to local folk artist to perform on large scale. Environmental impacts and strategies of sustainable tourism in Maharashtra: Due to dramatically rise in the Domestic as well as international tourism, currently metropolitan cities such as Mumbai and Pune, has facing pollution level problem, considering the case of Pune, in Pune the pollution level always on critical level. Local authority made strict rule for transportation and traffic rule to control the negative impact on the environment but still it not up to the good level to achieve low pollution in those metro cities. Every tourism activity affects the natural and built environment. The issue between tourism and environment has lot of complication, but to sustain it there are some strategies such as government has made plane to develop eco- tourism for this according to the requirement such as there is no any new construction will take place in preserved area for sanctuaries and other important places such as lakes and forest land. Changes can be made in old building such as government rest houses at hill station and sanctuaries. But, in fact those cost and expenditure on old construction is comparatively higher than new construction. On another side to develop or to sustain such sites, government and NGOs providing financial and knowledge about the eco- tourism to local people who surviving on the nature. For environmental sustainability government has chosen some part of Konkan in Mumbai, in this, the residence at those places are paid by government to develop their houses (Huts and Cottages) with amenities and other facilities but to ensure that life cycle of nature it should not be disturb. This is a really good example as well as strategy to understand the rural life at those places in touch with nature for next generation as well as the tourists from urban part also helps to increase income level and living standard (GoM, 2006). Economic sustainable strategies The economic Sustainability means the balance of rural and urban economics development. The government and private policy maker should consider reduction of rural as well as urban poverty in specific destination Shen et al., (2008). According to this as per mention earlier that currently the government and various private organization institutions working on the research area of Agriculture, nature (wildlife), medical (Health and safety), information technology-communication and at the end human resource development in the Maharashtra, to provide better employment opportunity to each people and to generate and increase the income level of each people and their standard of living. Now the current competitiveness shows that unbalance growth in various sector, such as labour on contract and seasonal basis. In short when the pinnacle period of any season starts then the employers often outsource the employment instead of local. The effect of this rises in dispute between local and outsourcing employee. The India is still developing country; Japan has been supporting in reconstruction of Ajanta caves in Maharashtra and Nalanda University is an ancient centre of higher learning in Bihar, it was a Buddhist centre of learning from 427 to 1197 CE. The economics of Maharashtra has highly depend on long haul and outbound tourist whose spending capacity is more than domestic tourist, as per discuss earlier that the stake holders play an important role in development in sustainable economic growth through employment and taxation, such stake holders in Maharashtra as Taj, Oberoy, Hilton, Best Western Hotels, Hyatt and in tourism Thomas Cook, Cox and King, SOTC and Raj Travel and other well known tourism service providers. Social sustainable strategies: Stren and Poleses (2000) define social sustainability as development (and or growth) that is compatible with the harmonious evolution of civil society, fostering an environment conducive to the compatible cohabitation of culturally and socially diverse groups while at the same time encouraging social integration, with improvements in the quality of life for all segments of the population (Davidson, M., 2009). Sex tourism a new phenomenon issue, according to Nair, P., and Sen, S., (2005) that not all the tourists are sex tourists, some of them definitely are. The sex incident happened in Goa had significant effect on Goas tourism, in which there is use of young girls for sex and pornography, by giving them shelter. According to Cooper et al., (2008) the growth of such activities is often supported by a network of facilitators ranging from pimps and brothels through to the apparently more respectable taxi drivers and hotel workers. The internet has only added to the problem by creating an international communication network that can market these services on international scale. Also, there are lonely child labour in small scale industries and without family, and mostly international tourists who come to enjoy their vacation, consider that child is safe as they feel that the children dont have any Sexual Transfer Diseases (Nair, P., and Sen, S., 2005). According to this the people of Maharashtra, stays in various societies there is always up and down glimpses of society can be seen in the social contest. So therefore, social upliftment and improved quality of life through exchanging culture adopting changes in environments and social life. In the situation like natural calamities, the requirement of unity to overcome from natural and manmade unpleasant incidents can be seen in the people of Maharashtra. Though, there may any disputes between different origins of peoples culture. Whereas, Kulkarni G., (2010) say that people may argue that issue of environment is enough, the enormity of the problem demands that, if each one of people of Maharashtra without blaming to the government authority does their bit toward conserving and sustaining the environment. Then it will ready to lend a hand to next generation to sustain environment with low economic price Conclusion: As a consultant, that every destination and attractions consumer and providers should understand that sustainable and non sustainable culture. Then, only the specific growth in next 10-15 year long term period can be achieved without extra energy. Also, balance must be maintain between limits and usage so that continuous changing, monitoring and planning ensure that tourism can be managed properly in Maharashtra (GoM, 2006). There is various strategies can be followed to develop competitiveness in tourism, keep in mind the importance of sustainability such as: Education and training: Once, people get basic education or knowledge about the environment and the sustainability in their life, and then the improvement within them can lead to help to their respective destination. For example: local tourist guide training programme, which will help to understand the history as well as importance of the place by local people and how they can serve to the tourist on competitive level. For, this government institution at Mumbai, Pune, Nagpur and Nashik has been playing an important role to give education and training to the seekers. In private organization Taj and Oberoy institution has most influence on tourism industry management in Maharashtra. Equal opportunity: There should be put some lime light on rest part of Maharashtra, because current policies highly concentrated on Mumbai only, it provide lots of job and opportunities to the people of respective destination and attraction, so the govt and private organization should not ignore the immense potential available at other places of Maharashtra. They could concentrate on Agricultural tourism, medical tourism, heritage tourism, adventure tourism and wild life tourism etc. The role of researchers and professional in decision making process: It can play an important role policy and strategy analysis, in simple words to identify positive and negative points through various researches which conducted by professionals and scholars. Because, the management and the govern body is solely responsible for any changes in process of development in tourism some time it can lead damages. Safety and security: Tourist should not be a victim of any manmade and natural calamity; extra care should be taken by the local government and tour operator because of any vulnerability in case of woman or loss human of national and international countries can affects on the specific destination and the future tourists and their decisions. Decentralization and accountability: The process of operation and management involves variety of task and governing body, to reduce timescale the requirement of quick and perfect decision to make changes or implementation of original strategies. As well as keeping records of each event and financial transaction leads to clear accountability in the tourism sector. And can help to make better forecasting for tourism in Maharashtra.<br/><br/>Saturday, July 20, 2019<br/><br/>Use of Symbolism in To Kill A Mockingbird "I'd rather you shoot at tin cans in the backyard, but I know you'll go after birds. Shoot all the bluejays you want , if you can hit 'em, but remember it's a sin to kill a mockingbird." This is what Atticus Finch tells his children after they are given air-rifles for Christmas. Uniquely, the title of the classic novel by Harper Lee, To Kill A Mockingbird, was taken from this passage. At first glance, one may wonder why Harper Lee decided to name her book after what seems to be a rather insignificant excerpt. After careful study, however, one begins to see that this is just another example of symbolism in the novel. Harper Lee uses symbolism rather extensively throughout this story, and much of it refers to the problems of racism in the South during the early twentieth century. Harper Lee's effective use of racial symbolism can be seen by studying various examples from the book. This includes the actions of the children, the racist whites, and the actions of Atticus Finch. The actions of the children in this novel certainly do have their share of symbolism. For instance, the building of a snowman by Jem and Scout one winter is very symbolic. There was not enough snow to make a snowman entirely out of snow, so Jem made a foundation out of dirt, and then covered it with what snow they had. One could interpret this in two different ways. First of all, the creation of the snowman by Jem can be seen as being symbolic of Jem trying to cover up the black man and showing that he is the same as the white man, that all human beings are virtually the same. Approval of these views is shown by Atticus when he tells Jem, "I didn't know how you were going to do it, but from now on I'll never worry about what'll become of you, son, you'll always have an idea." The fire that night that engulfed Miss Maudie Atkinson's house can be seen as the prejudice of Maycomb County, as the fire melted the snow from the snowman, and left nothing but a clump of mud. The fire depicts the prejudice people of the county saying that blacks and whites are, certainly, not the same. Another way of looking at the symbolism of the snowman would be to say that Jem's combination of mud and snow signifies miscegenation, marriage or sexual relations between persons of different races.<br/><br/>Friday, July 19, 2019<br/><br/>Human Condition Through Thomas Berry      Normally, I don't agree with Thomas Berry, but I agree with his quote â€Å"†¦inner anxiety and even†¦doubt ourselves and the meaning of it all.† Thomas Berry put the dimension of contemporary existence, future orientation, and placed it in what I consider a perfect statement. When we hit this realization of perplexity within our future, we will be in such awe. People will become over capacitated with the diversity of every day life. We will deviate into a whole different culture. Thomas Berry's statement was well conceived.      As in human condition, the journey symbol portrays an internal struggle. Also it depicts some form of transformation. Another thing appearing in both is a theme of endearing negativity. We know, or thing we know, all that we have is adequate. He puts this in a sense of hysteria with what we incur during our journey. He tells us that we live n an unacceptable situation and that we must undergo transformation. In my experiences, I have not yet covered this conflict in the large scale he puts it on.      When referring to spirituality, I believe that Berry places a strong emphasis on faith. In order for us to encompass happiness we must have a strong divinity towards spirituality. Spirituality in a certain religion. Spirituality in ourselves, others, etc. We also must have an awareness for the other divinities. The usual sense of religion relates to a general sense of faith. It is less than expected to pay homage to your god or belief. Berry's sense of religion inquires that belief of faith as well.      I don't agree with Berry's view on spirituality. I feel as though his belief would make all that I learned redundant. I feel as though people holding this view have either a horrible view on life or are stuck in a religious domicile. In his writings, Berry makes it seem like joy is not meaningful unless there is a downside to it.<br/><br/>Thursday, July 18, 2019<br/><br/>The Kennedy Law Firm, PLLC, serves the north-central part of Tennessee and south-central part of Kentucky, with offices in Clarksville, Tennessee. The firm was established on Christian principles, focusing on helping individuals through their greatest times of need, in 1984. The firm handles a wide array of types of cases, including personal injury, criminal defense, bankruptcy, divorce, and custody matters in state, federal, and military courts. Kevin C. Kennedy is its founding member and managing partner, yet still practices and is still active in the firm's operations. There are three office locations across the city; with a main office by the county courthouse, another office close to Fort Campbell's gates, and the last location provides a location closer to individuals on the northeastern part of town. Mission The Kennedy Law Firm's main mission is â€Å"to be that rock in times of trouble by providing quality legal advice and support to people going through divorce, an arrest, injury or bankruptcy† (Google+, 2015). The firm seeks to provide its services based on Christian ideals, which the founding partner pursues by actively participating in numerous community events. The office by Fort Campbell is even being used by a church for services and other meetings. Mr. Kennedy does not hide his commitment to God, and he boldly proclaims his views in advertising and other interactions. The firm meets this mission by opening at 7:00 AM Monday through Friday, staying open until 6:00 PM Monday through Thursday, and being open on Saturdays from 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM. There is not one other firm in the Clarksville area that has hours which are as accommodating to their customer base. Mr. Kennedy even encourages his attorneys to schedule appointments outside of those hours, should it be something that the customer needs to get the legal service desired. Customers The Kennedy Law Firm's external customer base is made up of individuals from all walks of life, from rich to poor, Christian to non-believer, and any and all race or ethnicity. Virtually anyone may fall victim to the perils of a legal battle, so the firm's customers cannot be classified as falling within any particular â€Å"type† or â€Å"category†. Internally, the firm's customers are made up of the attorneys. The paralegals, assistants, and other support staff must ensure that the work they are doing meets the needs and wants of the attorneys. Furthermore, the attorneys must work hard to meet the high standards for a Christian organization, as set by the managing partner. Value As an attorney for the firm, I provide legal services for the customers that walk through the door. More specifically, I am one of only a couple of attorneys that have committed to remain in the office until 6:00 PM to ensure that an attorney is available when the office is open. Furthermore, I provide greater payment flexibility to clients so that they might actually be able to afford quality legal representation without taking on an insurmountable debt. Even though as a young attorney with a growing client base I do not make an income which many may attribute to attorneys when they think of them, I still attempt to take on pro bono work to help those individuals that cannot even afford the flexible payment arrangements which we try to establish. My previous work for Westlaw, a legal research provider, has also made me invaluable to the firm. I have helped other attorneys and paralegals in the firm with posing research queries and setting up their accounts to get the most from the system with the least amount of effort. I was able to increase the efficiency of research efforts for practically every individual within the firm. This means that the services we provide can be done at less cost, a saving which can be passed on to clients in an effort to make justice more accessible for all. Biblical Integration Christianity plays a huge role in this firm, and it was one of the major factors which drew me to seeking employment with the firm. Not only does the firm unashamedly advertise its Christian ideals and roots, the atmosphere in the office shows the same strong embrace of such ideals. Employees are free to discuss their religious viewpoints with one another, which only further solidifies the family-like environment which permeates the firm. Every meeting is closed with a prayer, and every morning a Bible study session is offered in the conference room for those employees wanting and able to attend. Reference The Kennedy Law Firm, PLLC. Google+ profile page. Retrieved on January 25, 2015, from <br/><br/>everyplace the last fifty geezerhood, a batch has changed when it comes voting and racial discrimination. The marches from Selma to capital of Alabama, aluminum necessitate changed our history as a whole, forever. The intentions of the three marches were for African Americans to imbibe the right to vote right wish the white men. There were three distinct attempts for the marches from Selma to Montgomery frame 7, March 9, and March 21, 1965. The attempts to gain their voting rights came at a price they were beaten, clubbed, murdered, trampled upon and all kinds of things by the police during these marches. At least til now though the Civil Rights interpret of 1964 had just been passed only a couple months before, African Americans were still world purloind at the polls. They were non allowed to vote and if they were allowed to register than they were accustomed literacy tests, which bulk of them failed. Unlike during 1965 when the marches took place, African Americans did non imbibe the right to vote, they were segregated, discriminated upon, etc.Martin Luther King, the example or leader for the people during marches, treasured to march in a peaceable behavior to show the police and everyone else that they were non animals and they would not give up until they were given the rights that they deserve. The result of these marches came when President Lyndon Johnson call Congress involving the matter asking for enactment that would prohibit the polls in exploitation barriers to prevent African Americans from voting. The Voting Rights Act of 1965 was passed that August 1965. This piece of legislation basically states that the government cant discriminate during the voting process based on race and also prohibits the use of literacy tests as a requirement to vote because nigh black people during this time could uncomplete read or write.Also beneath this act the United States attorney commonplace had to challenge the use of poll taxes for local anaesthetic and state elections. Things in this, the twenty-first century, be oft better than they were during Selma marches because in that respect is a vision less racial discrimination and discrimination towards African Americans. African Americans fix the same rights as white men, as do women, as written in the Bill of Rights. If Selma would chip in never occurred, or occurred in a violent manner rather than the nonviolent way it was, Africans Americans capacity not have the right to vote to this day, or worse. Also, without out the success of the Selma to Montgomery we would more than likely not have as many African Americans in political office as we do today.Times are so much better now than they were fifty years ago because African Americans now have 100% freedom and all of their rights. African Americans, as well as women, cook to vote without having to worry about being discriminated against, as well as tested. Selma created border for a greater number of African Americans to become involved in political affairs at local, state, and national levels. Selma moved(p) our political system a lot and without it we more than likely wouldnt have some of the people we do in major positions in the government, such as President Obama. | Dé Céadaoin, Iúil 31, 2019 ann<br/><br/>Dé Máirt, 30 Iúil 2019<br/><br/>I 1999, rinne an Cumann Idirnáisiúnta um Meastóireacht ar Ghnóthachtálacha Oideachais (IEA) staidéar ar chleachtais oideolaíoch múinteoirí agus scoláirí ar bhunscolaíochtaí agus iar-bhunscoileanna i 30 náisiún, agus ar ról na teicneolaíochta sin (€�"An Dara Teicneolaíocht Faisnéise i Staidéar Oideachais: Modúl 2†��, n. ). Fuarthas amach nach bhfuil rochtain ar an Idirlíon ina scoileanna (€�1, 1999) ag 12% de na bun-sconna agus 3% díobh siúd i scoileanna idirmheánacha agus meánscoileanna. Bheadh líon den sórt sin go mór fós, má tá an tréimhse nuair a bhí na buntáistí a bhaineann le cur i bhfeidhm na teicneolaíochta ríomhaireachta san oideachas intuigthe, á gcur san áireamh. Thosaigh teicneolaíocht ríomhaireachta le haghaidh scoláirí i scoileanna amach mar saotharlanna ríomhaireachta (Lynch, 2000), atá ag teacht chun cinn go leanúnach chun bheith ina uirlis don fhoghlaim. Go bhfuil comhtháthú na teicneolaíochta ríomhaireachta i scoileanna fós ar an bpróiseas, tugann sé le fios, cé gur moladh go leanúnach a buntáistí, go bhfuil fórsaí cumhachtacha sóisialta agus forbartha ann freisin a chuireann i gcoinne a dhul chun cinn. De réir Meredyth, etc., I rith an ceanglófar stádas sa mhodh teagaisc na hiarrachtaí a chomhtháthú teicneolaíocht ríomhaire i meánscoileanna. Ar dtús, Áitíonn na daoine a bhí i gcoinne chur i bhfeidhm na teicneolaíochta ríomhaireachta i scoileanna go mbeadh na teagascóirí daonna athsholáthair agus á ndéanamh acu as feidhm (Richmond, n. d). De réir mar a thagann sé chun solais nach mbeadh sé seo riachtanach mar sin, is é sin, ní bheadh ach ról ag teagascóir simplí chun éascaithe, an fhadhb a bhaineann leis an easpa acmhainní fisiciúla (Richmond, n. d. ) agus easpa oiliúna na dteagascóirí (Lynch, 2000). Tugann sé seo le tuiscint nach bhfuil gá leis an ról atá ag teicneolaíocht ríomhaireachta in oideachas mac léinn tánaisteacha per se, an mhórbhreithniú san iarratas a rinneadh air agus go bhfuil gá leis an ngá atá le sainmhíniú soiléir ar a ról chun dlús a chur le cinntí maidir le cibé an bhfuil gá i ndáiríre le líon na crua-earraí ríomhaireachta a chur leis nó a choinneáil i scoileanna, nó gur cheart go mbeadh gá le hoiliúint theicniúil éigeantach do theagascóirí. De réir Richmond (n.d.), tá dhá fhadhb mhór ann maidir le teicneolaíocht ríomhaireachta a chur i bhfeidhm san oideachas: (1) níl na spriocanna agus na cuspóirí a bhaineann le cur i bhfeidhm soiléir; (2) ní thuigeann na h-allmhaireoirí go hiomlán na hathruithe is gá chun an teicneolaíocht a chur chun feidhme san oideachas. Ní mór aghaidh a thabhairt ar na fadhbanna seo ar dtús má tá rath ar an gcéad dul síos. Cé gur gnéithe tábhachtacha den chur i bhfeidhm iad an dá cheann, díreoidh an páipéar seo i sainiú an sprioc, na gcuspóirí nó an róil atá ag teicneolaíocht ríomhaireachta i ngnóthas na mac léinn ar leibhéal na meánscoile. Chun an ról ríthábhachtach seo a thuiscint, tá sé an-tábhachtach go mbeadh eolas agat ar dtús faoi roinnt teoiricí foghlama agus a chur i bhfeidhm faoi láthair ar theicneolaíocht an oideachais. Deir teoiric na tógálaigh go dtarlaíonn an fhoghlaim trí iarrachtaí gníomhacha na bhfoghlaimeoirí chun eolas nua a chomhshamhlú a chuireann an teagascóir nó a chuireann féin-fhionnachtana (â €�"Theries of Learning††�, 2006). Ciallaíonn sé sin go gcaithfidh foghlaimeoirí a bheith in ann an méid a fhoghlaimíonn siad dá dtaithí nó an fhoghlaim féin a bheith in ann í a thuiscint go hiomlán. D'fhonn a fhoghlaim chun feithicil a thiomáint, ní hamháin go bhfuil a fhios ag feithiclí atá faoi thiomáint ag gásailín, á rialú ag baint úsáide as roth stiúrtha, tá cos gáis chun dul ar aghaidh nó ar gcúl agus cos sos chun é a dhéanamh stop a chur. Tá sé nó sí ag iarraidh eolas a fháil ar gach teoiric a bhfuil sé nó sí tógtha uirthi agus, dá bhrí sin, tá an taithí seo an-tábhachtach má bhíonn sé nó sí chun cinntí a dhéanamh a luaithe a thógann sé nó sí an bóthar. Is féidir teicneolaíocht ríomhaireachta, nuair a bhaineann sí le foghlaim a chur i bhfeidhm ar an gcaoi chéanna, trí mheán a sholáthar chun réaltacht a insamhail chun mothú a thabhairt do na scoláirí ar an méid a d’fhéadfadh a bheith ann nó nach bhféadfadh tarlú dá thoradh ar a gcinntí. Is feidhm é sin na insamhaltaí: a shuiteáil i spriocanna foghlaimeoirí atá cosúil leis an réaltacht agus mothúcháin toradh a d'fhéadfadh tarlú sa saol fíor mar gheall ar na cinntí a fhorchuirtear leis an gclár. Tá forbairt déanta ar a lán de na cláir insamhalta chun críocha éagsúla anois.Soláthraíonn Sim Cathrach an fhoghlaim-jammer taithí ar thógáil cathrach agus mothú ar a bheith ina Méara. Tá an foghlaimeoir-ghéar ag múineadh na tábhachta a bhaineann le pleanáil agus conas a d’fhéadfadh gach cinneadh tionchar dearfach a bheith aige (thír i bhfoirm ioncaim na cathrach) nó diúltach (i bhfoirm rallies agus laghdú ar ioncam na cathrach). Tugann insamhaltaí gnó taithí éagsúil d'fhoghlaimeoirí ar úinéireacht agus ar láimhseáil infheistíochtaí iarbhír gan gá le húsáid nó a chailleadh fíor-airgead. Tugann cláir dearaidh smaoineamh nó dearcadh an fhoghlaimeora ar na dearcthaí nó an toradh a d’fhéadfadh a bheith ag gach dearadh san áireamh agus deis é a ionramháil nó a athrú de réir a mhianta fiú sula réadú iarbhír an dearaidh. Tá insamhaltaí i go leor ábhar éagsúla cosúil le fisic bitheolaíochta agus ceimic, a fhéadann an foghlaimeoir a chur ar fáil leis an deis a shamhlú na teoiricí agus cásanna a ionramháil agus ansin na torthaí a fheiceáil a bheadh mar a bheadh a tharlóidh dá gcuirfí na teoiricí i bhfeidhm. D'úsáid an tionscal eitlíochta agus míleata na insamhaltaí le blianta fada agus díreach go dtí le déanaí, tá costais na n-insamhaltaí níos lú a chosc institiúidí leas a bhaint as a buntáistí (Beohle, n. d.). Cé nach bhfuil, fós saor, olltáirgeadh, curtha leis an feabhsú suntasach sin ar rátaí coinneála foghlama (Beohelle, n. d.), soláthraíonn insamhaltaí uirlis an-éifeachtach don fhoghlaim. Tá borradh 75-8% ar ráta coinneála foghlama do mhic léinn in ionsamhluithe (Boehle, n. d. ) Creideann an Comhchoiste um Oideachas agus Oiliúint go bhfuil eolas ar fáil go sóisialta, is é sin, go mbaintear an t-eolas amach trí iarrachtaí grúpa (€�"Theories of Learning†�, 2006). †���� Tá sé seo ag foghlaim le daoine eile agus trí ionchur agus smaointe daoine eile a tháinig le chéile leo féin. leagann an teoiric seo béim ar thábhacht tuairimí duine eile de ghnáth chun feabhas a chur ar an obair sin. Cuirtear é seo i bhfeidhm ar theicneolaíocht ríomhaireachta ina ról sa mheánscoil, ceadaíonn sé seo idirghníomhú i measc go leor daoine éagsúla, gan a bheith teoranta dóibh siúd sa seomra ranga ach a síleann sé freisin do dhaoine i gcriosanna ama éagsúla. Ligeann sé seo do chomhshamhlú smaointe nua agus éagsúla ó dhaoine éagsúla ó áiteanna éagsúla a mbíonn smaointe difriúla acu de ghnáth faoi shaincheisteanna éagsúla, réasúnaíocht na ndaoine a neartú agus eolas duine a fheabhsú faoi go leor réimsí éagsúla agus ag an am céanna scil shóisialta duine a fheabhsú. Is é an cineál teicneolaíochta is gnách a chuireann teoiric na Tógála Sóisialta ná fóraim.Is féidir a lán fóraim a fháil ar an idirlíon, gach réimse eolais lena chuid féin: na healaíona, na heolaíochtaí, an mhatamaitic agus an fhealsúnacht. Creideann Theory of Behaviourism gur tuairisceoir €3�" é an t-eolas a bhaineann le freagairtí iompraíochta do spreagthaí comhshaoil (€�" teoiric na Foghlama  �, 2006). De réir na teoirice seo, tarlaíonn foghlaim trí athinsint agus treisiú, de ghnáth leis an teagascóir ag labhairt agus ag an bhfoghlaimeoir, ag éisteacht. Tá an teoiric foghlama seo os coinne na tionscantaíocha ina bhfaigheann foghlaimeoirí eolas ar fad faoi obair an tsamhsaoireacht. Is é seo an cineál modh teagaisc is coitianta a úsáidtear i scoileanna.Mar sin féin, is féidir an modh teagaisc seo a chur i bhfeidhm freisin ar theicneolaíocht ríomhaireachta.Tá ranganna teagaisc ar fáil go forleathan anois sa mhargadh. Insamhail na táirgí seo an méid a mhúineann múinteoirí agus an chaoi a n-idirghníomhaíonn siad i rang iarbhír, ag míniú coincheapa le taifeadtaí gutha in éineacht le pictiúir atá ag gluaiseacht le haghaidh léirshamhlaithe. Baineann sé freisin le cleachtaí cleachtais mar cad a thabharfadh múinteoirí dá gcuid daltaí chun foghlaim an scoláire a mheas.Is é an t-aon difríocht ná gur féidir leis an scoláire na táirgí seo a úsáid ina n-aonar, fiú sa bhaile.<br/><br/>Is é seo an pictiúr laethúil de mo bhaile dúchais suite ó thuaidh ó Abhainn na hUaimhe i gContae an Mhóta ná Réalt an Bhócair, an sceiméanaigh ard agus an lá nua-aimseartha. Sea, thug mé faoi deara páirceanna stáit áille, teach solais, agus comharthaí do thurasóireacht, ach ní hé gur turasóir é, níor thuig mé riamh nó gur thug mé aire dóibh ar an gcúis go mealladh Middletown fiú turasóirí. Bhí mé ag tnúth leis an bpáipéar taighde seo, mar thug sé deis dom tábhacht stairiúil an áit a raibh cónaí orm a fhoghlaim. Chuir mé an domhan ar fad € �"h na turasóireachta agá †��� ar na sráideanna agus ghlac sé leis. An rud a d’fhoghlaim mé agus a thapaigh mé, rinneadh lár Bhaile na Mleán a mhéadú i stair, sainchomharthaí tíre agus gach rud a bhí nua go bunúsach nuair a d’éirigh liom mo déanach ar maidin. Sula bhfaca mé an €�"sigh €�� go ndeachaigh mé chomh minic gan sos, theastaigh uaim foghlaim faoi stair Middletown féin, na fíricí simplí.Socraíonn an Béarla an baile l665 a d’éirigh as an Long Island, Nua Eabhrac agus Nua Sasana. B’éigean dóibh an talamh a cheannach ó na treibheanna Indiach áitiúla agus bhunaigh siad trí shráidbhaile ar dtús; d’eagraigh Pointe Portland, Shrewsbury agus Middletown. Níor tháinig Port Reachrann chun cinn, ach bhí an dá sráidbhaile eile faoi rath agus measadh gurbh iad na bailte €�" Two Towns of the Navíkink†† (Gabraiceian, 2003). D’fhan líon mór cónaitheoirí umhal do Shasana agus cé gur aimsíodh cuid eile dá neamhspleáchas. De réir Randall Barilan, â €�" ba chogadh cathartha fíorúil é an choimhlint i New Jersey. Bhí rannpháirtithe namhaid sa chath mór i New Jersey i gceannas ar Bhaile an Mheán-Mhór. Rinne fórsaí na Breataine na cnoic láir sna cathanna. Níor shamhlaigh mé riamh go raibh píosa de stair ár náisiúin roinnte. Is baile beag é de thart ar 60,000 duine, ar Abhainn na hUaimhe. Ar an drochuair, bhí tríocha sé cónaitheoirí againn ar an 11 Meán Fómhair, ach leis sin tá ráta ár gcoirce 0.6 in aghaidh an 1,000 duine (epodunk.com, 2007). Go dtí an páipéar shíl mé de Middletown mar sráidbhaile quaint leis an ghné is suntasaí a bheith go Rugadh Bruce Springsteen, Geraldo Riviera agus Vincent Lombardi. Ós rud é go raibh mé pas a fháil cúpla € Å" sean  � eaglaisí ar mo bhealach chun Starbucks, shíl mé gur mhaith leat cuardach ar an stair spioradáltacht na Middletown. Bhí roinnt ainmníochtaí éagsúla go luath ar an Eaglais Baiste a bunaíodh i 1688, an eaglais is sine i New Jersey, agus ar a laghad leath de na lonnaitheoirí bunaidh ar eolas le bheith ar an gcreideamh seo. Bunaíodh Eaglais Cuimhneacháin na Spáinne Uile i Navíkin, i l864 agus is é an t-uafásach Náisiúnta Stairiúil i 1988. Roghnaíodh Richard Upjohn, físbheidh an tréimhse seo, lena ailtire Ghotach Béarla, chun an eaglais a thógáil ina raibh an bunchloch i L863. De réir láithreán gréasáin oifigiúil eile; www. allasnavesink. • Deonaíodh deontas €� leis an eaglais ó Iontaobhas New Jersey Stairiúil chun plean caomhnaithe fadtéarmach a fhorbairt. †�� Tá an scéal taobh thiar den Eaglais Eaglais Eaglais Chríostaí Eipocal, a tógadh i l702 suimiúil. Ní raibh sé faoi lonnaitheoirí Sasana ag dul le chéile chun adhradh; bhí sé níos mó de € Å "brú ar an mbonn € Å. †�� Gairbhoncóileach, Lewis Morris, scríobh chuig easpaig Londain i measc mhuintir Bhaile na Mainistir Láir: €� B’fhéidir go bhfuil siad, na daoine is aineolach agus is ghránna ar domhan † » » »  Chuir an tEaspag beirt sagairt ón Afganastáin chuig €Å† Middletown. Bhí sé sin os cionn trí chéad bliain ó shin agus is pobal gníomhach fós é an Eaglais Chríostaí (criathar-óg.org). Tá réimse eile de Middletown nach raibh ar eolas agam, á shnamhlú ard ar chnoc agus ar a dtugtar an Club Caille Uisce, a bunaíodh i 1895. Tá sé ar eolas mar gheall ar chultúr eisiach an chlub, €�€ Š�� € € € Š������� agus ailtireacht. Faoi láthair tá ceithre theach daichead i gClub na nGiúdach a choinneíonn a charm ag €�’ an t-sean domhanda, ‘���’ ar fud a stair. Suíomh iontach ar bharr cnoic, a d'éalaigh mé chomh fada (Van Develde, 2003). Sula chuirim tú féin agus mé féin in aithne do na sainchomharthaí stairiúla eile i Meán Fómhair, tá aon rud amháin a bhí iontas orm a nochtadh. Ba é an t-ainm “The Times Herald-Re Records”, agus ar an gcéad phreastail fhuar sa tír, a foilsíodh i 1851. Ina dhiaidh sin, an Middletown Daily Records, an chéad US. i.Cuireadh tús le nuachtán an tí le cineál fuar a úsáid, a phriontáil ó gharáiste, adhainte iomaíochta don Taifead. I l69, tháinig an dá pháipéar isteach sa Taifead Dé Domhnaigh, ach a aisghabhtar ar ais go dtí an Times Herald-Record in 2007. Léiríonn foirm an nuachtáin seo ó chineál fuar go suíomh Gréasáin, i 2008, amlíne na nuálaíochtaí (taifead a dhéanamh ar líne). Anois, ar ais go dtí gur turasóir mé, chuir mé tús leis na sainchomharthaí stairiúla a bhí leasaithe le haghaidh na nglúnta. Tógadh Marlpit Hall i roinnt céimeanna agus críochnaíodh é i 1756. Ba é baile an iris Éadbhard Taylor agus a theaghlach. Coinníodh Taylor faoi ghabháil tí as a chuid tuairimí polaitiúla agus chaill sé an chuid is mó dá shaibhreas agus dá thionchar. I l936, bronnadh an teach ar Chumann Staire Chontae Mhuineacháin. Thug an Cumann an chéad mhúsaem do gach seomra tithe sa cheantar agus tá cúig sheomra curtha ar fáil aige le léiriú a fháil ar an suíomh ó l756 go dtí 1820. Is é €�" an eochair-maoineach †��� i gClár Náisiúnta na nÁiteanna Stairiúla i mBaile an Mheán-Mhórbhaile. Is é €� an t-ainm €� a thugtar ar an Halla Marlpit ná Teach Taylor- Butler, a thóg daltaí ón bhliain 1853 i measc mhuintir Marlpit. Ba i gcaitheamh deich mbliana tar éis a báis, ach i 1930, a thug Joseph Taylor agus a bhean chéile air, Teach an Úllord, go háirithe nuair a bhí siad ag cur sult as an teach. Cheannaigh Henry Ludwig Kramer, ailtire cáiliúil, é dá theach agus dá oifig, a ionad stairiúil a athchóiriú. Cheannaigh George agus Alice Butler é ó Kramer sna 1950idí; agus Cumann Stairiúil Chontae an Chontae Mhuine Theas, cheannaigh sé an t-eastát in l99. Tá áit stairiúil ag an gCumann sa Mheán-Baile Átha Cliath freisin.Bhunaigh grúpa saoránach é sa bhliain l898, a bhí tiomanta do stair Chontae Mhuineacháin a chaomhnú. Thóg siad trí scéal cumann Seoirseach i l931 le músaem agus leabharlann a chur ar fáil (c.m. nj). Tá dhá theach feirme stairiúla ag an Meánoirthear; Teach Mháistreacht agus Feirm D. Heath. Tógadh Teach Feirme Murray agus tógadh an scioból in l770 agus fanann sé ar a mbunsraith. Tháinig Joseph Murray agus a mháthair ó Éirinn sa l767 go Contae Mhóthanach áit ar bhuail sé le chéile agus ar phós sé Rebecca Morris, agus bhí ceathrar clainne aige. Thosaigh Joseph ag obair leis an mhíleata áitiúil, €�h i mBeirlín, agus ansin fuair sé an leasainm, €�"dar, reibiliúnach, †� toisc go raibh sé €�’ de ghnáth. †�� D’fhan an fheirm sa teaghlach go dtí go raibh l861 aige, agus bhí roinnt úinéirí air go dtí gur cheannaigh an Baile Láir é i 1973 go €� †� Níl an teach ar fáil don phobal inniu ach tá imeachtaí agus turais leanúnacha ar fud na scioból agus na feirme (poicpark.org). Soláthraíonn Feirm Maois D. Heath rochtain ar go leor taispeántais chun tábhacht stairiúil na feirmeoireachta a léiriú i gContae an Mhóta. Cuimsíonn siad; feirm ón 19ú haois €�" déantúsáin, Bailiúchán Teach Trá Gertrude (111-19998), agus coilíneacht agus músaem beochta. †��† Cuireann an fheirm oidhreacht an teaghlaigh Heath, go príomha Bertha C. Heath. Ba iar sclábhaí é, a bhí i Clinton, go dtí gur theith an Cogadh Cathartha é, agus theith sé go Baile na Meán-Baile lena dheartháir Calvin; a tháinig chun bheith ina chéad phrionsa ag Eaglais an tSe Ghlais, a bunaíodh in 1870. Nuair a socraíodh é mar fheirmeoir barr chuir sé a bhean chéile agus a chlann trí bliana déag. Ba í Bertha an €�’an duine is óige de 6 chailín í. €�� » Rugadh í sa fheirm áit chónaithe ar 22 Iúil, 1909, bhí dhá mhíle aici chun í a thógáil ar scoil, €�� gach maidin. Bhain Bertha céim mhór amach i Scoil Ard-Scoil Bhaile an Mheán-Baileáin sa bhliain 1926; bhog sí go dtí an Mhathainistir Uachtarach, Nua Eabhrac agus bhí sí ina gcónaí ann ar feadh ceithre bliana is daichead. Le linn na tréimhse sin bhain sí céim Baitsiléir Eolaíochta san Ollscoil Sláinte Poiblí amach i 1958 agus céim Máistir Eolaíochta ó Ollscoil Columbia. Chuaigh Bertha thar a raibh cead ag mná dubha nó in ann é a dhéanamh, agus bhain sí taitneamh as a bheith ag obair mar altra cláraithe go dtí go ndeachaigh sí ar scor sa bhliain 1974. D’eagraigh Bertha le cabhair óna nia, Walter Sprley agus oibrithe deonacha gan áireamh, Coiste Stair an Ionaid Sláinte Dubh, a bhí rannpháirteach i gceiliúradh an Mhí Naofa. D’fhan an réadmhaoin sa Teaghlach Sláinte ó bhlianta an Dara Cogadh Cathartha sa phost agus d’iompaigh sí isteach i lár stair talmhaíochta na hAceirge Nua-Aféireach. In éineacht le taispeántais atá luaite cheana féin, tá gairdín oideachais do pháistí, siopa gabha dubh, is féidir le siúcra taispeántas a mhuilinn agus a €�€ ”ar an dóigh a ndearnadh feirmeoireacht sa 9ú haois, †� (heafar. tridem.com). Is é an sainchomhartha dheireanach a dhéanfaidh mé athbhreithniú ar Theach Solas Hook Sandy. Tógtha i l764 gurb é an teach solais is sine é sa náisiún agus ceann den dá cheann déag a tógadh roimh an gCogadh Réabhlóideach. Tá sé otagal, agus ardaíonn ocht troigh is ocht os cionn na talún agus ochtó is ocht troigh os cionn an uisce. Hook gaineamh nua a fuair maoiniú ó thús go raibh na ceannaithe caillte a lán airgid agus baill foirne ó longwrecks. Bhí trúpaí Mheiriceá agus Shasana araon ag iarraidh rialú a dhéanamh ar an teach solais le linn an chogaidh, agus mar sin thug comórsaí Nua Eabhrac an t-ordú chun é a dhraenáil chun longa na Breataine a chur ar ais. Rinne na Meiriceánaigh iarracht fiú an teach solais a scriosadh le gunnaí móra, ach níor bheag damáiste dá struchtúr a bhí i gceist leis an mBanríon, bhí an Bhriotanach i gceannas ar Hook Sandy Hook ar fud an Réabhlóid. †��nó eile suimiúil ón tSeirbhís Pháirc Náisiúnta gur sheas an teach solais cúig chéad troigh ó thuaidh de Bhaile na Naomh Muire, agus anois, mar gheall ar an sruth uisce, is é €� an solas cúig-ochtú míle ón bpointe. †��� neamhdhíobhálach don solas leanann sé ag cuidiú le mairtínéalaigh, mar tá €�" déanta go dílis do na blianta l96, † agus ainmníodh é mar Cheannabh Náisiúnta ar Eanáir 29, 1964 (ns.gov). Bhí mé ag siúl i bróga a thabhairt faoi deara na sainchomharthaí stairiúla náisiúnta, i bhfolach seoda nádúrtha agus réimsí sáite sa stair, go litriúil i mo chúlchlós féin. Tá an t-am atá caite doscriosta taobh thiar de mo radharcanna laethúla ar an eaglais deartha Gotach, na tithe feirme, agus tithe na haoise athchóirithe. Mo siúlóid go dtí Starbucks bíonn ar go hiomlán difriúil bhrí le haghaidh dom anois; Mé a chur sé níos moille, breathnú ar an tírdhreach ealaíne agus a ghlacadh bród i fhios agam ag siúl síos an cosán tríd an stair.<br/><br/>Luan, Iúil 29, 2019<br/><br/>ainmniú, Taxonomy, aicmiú víris - Aiste Sampla eile de pataiginí san áireamh na nematodes, fungais agus baictéir. I Bitheolaíocht, úsáidtear an téarma ainmníocht chun tagairt a dhéanamh d’ainmniú na ngrúpaí éagsúla tacsamónacha de réir na gcoinbhinsiún idirnáisiúnta. Nuair a thagann sé chun víris a ainmniú, tá comhlacht speisialta de chúram air leis an bhfreagracht seo. Tugtar an Coiste Idirnáisiúnta ar Thíoanamaíochta Víris (ICTV) air (ar a dtugtaí an Coiste Idirnáisiúnta ar Ainmníocht Víreas) in 1966. Is é an coiste Roinn Virology Aontas Idirnáisiúnta na gCumann mhicribhitheolaíoch.Murab ionann agus ainmniú na n-orgánach beo eile, ní ainmnítear víris i ndáil le córas déthéarmach ilghnéitheach Chúil an Dúin. Tá siad ainmnithe trí fhocail de bhunadh Béarla ainmneacha nua cháinmheánacha idirnáisiúnta a úsáid tá sé seo de réir an Choiste Idirnáisiúnta um Tomhaltú Víreas, R. I. B. Franki (1991). Riail Uimh. 10 – leagtar amach rialacha maidir le litriú ainmneacha na teanga a úsáidtear i Roinn 6 de Chaibidil 3 den ainmníocht víreasach atá beartaithe. 13. —Nuair a bheifear tar éis na siombailí a chomhaontú i Moscó i 1966, féadfaidh na siombailí a theacht tar éis giorrúchán d’ainm óstach ar leith, ach más gá, féadfar ainm iomlán a úsáid in ionad an ghiorrúcháin fós, ar ainm iomlán é a bhaineann le tacsanomaíocht víris éagsúla, agus tháinig an Coiste Idirnáisiúnta nRéineéineéineasamhacha le neamhspleáchas aontaithe. Baineann an córas aicmithe úsáid as na cánacha atá leagtha síos thíos; Léiríonn an liosta reatha ón gCoiste Idirnáisiúnta um Tacsóiméin an víris (ICTV) go bhfuil trí ordú víreasacha (dSN) ann; Is iad na cauviles – na leathanaigh aigéad dí-ocsainiúil (dNA) atá ceangailte go dúbailte, Mononegavales – is iad seo na cinn a bhfuil virníní domhanda den chineál céanna aigéad ribonculeic aontacha (s) agus<br/><br/>Dé Domhnaigh, Iúil 28, 2019<br/><br/>Conas a spreagann Google a gcuid fostaithe - Aiste Sampla Tá cultúr na heagraíochta curtha ar fáil ina chuidiú dá chuid fostaithe. An chéad ghné eile a chuireann nuálaíocht táirgí chun cinn fostaithe. Tá an chuideachta ina ceannaire i ndáil le coinníollacha a sholáthar atá riachtanach do rannpháirtíocht an fhostaí sa nuálaíocht. Díríonn an chuideachta tuilleadh ar phaisean fostaithe a dhéanamh seachas ar phá. Tá sé ríthábhachtach freisin a rá go raibh foireann bainistíochta Google in ann cruthaitheacht a spreagadh agus rialú eagraíochtúil a fheabhsú. Tá sé ar cheann de spriocanna na heagraíochta freisin maidir le húsáid sonraí chun luach saothair a sholáthar d’fhostaí agus maidir le spreagadh (Múl, 2015). Baineann gnéithe spreagtha eile na heagraíochta lena luach saothair pá. Faigheann fostaithe san eagraíocht buntáistí éagsúla pá nuálaíocha a spreagann iad i dtreo rath na heagraíochta.Soláthraíonn foirne bhainistíochta na heagraíochta seomra don fhostaí chun a gcuid smaointe féin a chur chun cinn. Soláthraíonn siad seo bunáiteanna éagsúla d'fhostaithe chun a gcuid táirgí féin a chruthú (Múl, 2015), ar ais, chuig straitéisí den sórt sin, tá Google in ann fostaithe a earcú a bhfuil scileanna an-ard acu. Is í an ghné spreagúil eile den eagraíocht ná gníomhaíochtaí dúshlánacha spreagúla a sholáthar dá bhfostaithe.Ní mór d’eagraíochtaí nua-aimseartha bealaí nuálacha a úsáid chun a chuid fostaithe a spreagadh. Trí spreagadh a thabhairt d'fhostaithe cinntíonn sé go bhfuil eagraíochtaí in ann a n-iarrachtaí a uasmhéadú.Tá eagraíochtaí nua-aimseartha in ann smaointe na bhfostaithe a shruthlíniú i leith táirgí a nuáil.<br/><br/>Dé Sathairn, Iúil 27, 2019<br/><br/>Traschult Communication - Aiste Tá na torthaí a bhailítear ó na hargóintí seo an-tábhachtach chun scrúdú a dhéanamh ar chultúir an ghnó agus chun cumarsáid idirnáisiúnta a dhéanamh. Gné ríthábhachtach den rath eagraíochtúil is ea cumarsáid, ach ní mór do gach gné den chumarsáid teacht i gcomhthráth leis na noirm eagraíochtúla agus na cleachtais a threoraíonn an cultúr (Mcintosh et al 2008. Éilíonn gach bainistíocht cultúir eagrúcháin go maith, áfach, mar a chuireann Halla leis, chun iarrachtaí na heagraíochta a chomhordú agus a threorú i dtreo ghnóthú na gcuspóirí eagrúcháin (Halverson agus Tmizi 2008). Is éard atá i gceist le feidhmeanna bainistíochta feidhmíocht pleanála, eagraithe, cheannródaíoch agus rialaithe gach réimse den eagraíocht. Mar sin féin, tá sé seo beagán difriúil ós rud é go bhfuil bainistíocht ar ghnéithe cultúrtha éagsúla i gceist le cumarsáid thraschultúrtha chun imeall iomaíoch a bhaint amach sa mhargadh domhanda (Kachru 2005). Tá fianaise tacaíochta curtha ar fáil ag formhór na n-alt léannta a foilsíodh le 10 mbliana anuas go bhfuil comhthéacs an Bhainc Ceannais Eorpaigh maidir le bainistíocht thraschultúrtha an-suntasach do réadú bhainistíocht ghnó dhomhanda (Halverson agus Tirmizi 2008). Tá sé seo amhlaidh toisc nach bhfuil fianaise leordhóthanach agus argóintí cáilíochtúla in easnamh ar fhormhór na samhlacha a úsáideadh roimh chomhthéacs Halla (DeFillippi agus Wanel 2006). Cé go bhfuil meas ag múnla Halla ar a bhailíocht maidir le comhthéacsanna agus cumarsáid chultúrtha a chinneadh, Áitíonn roinnt taighdeoirí nach bhfuil bailíocht agus dearcadh riachtanach aige i ngnéithe cultúrtha. An príomhchuspóir más é an taighde seo an scála comhleanúnach a bhaineann le gné chultúrtha Halla an Chomhphobail a chinneadh agus tá torthaí bailí á dtairiscint maidir le cumarsáid laistigh de thimpeallacht ghnó na Gearmáine. De réir Halla an AE, tá cultúr mar bhealach maireachtála a fheidhmíonn daoine<br/><br/>Dé hAoine, 26 Iúil 2019<br/><br/>Comhionannas Inscne; is miotas nó réaltacht é - Aiste Samplach Tá struchtúr agus feidhmiú éagsúil inchinn, imoibríonn siad freisin le cásanna éagsúla mar sin is miotas iad fir inscne.(Téis) Ar ndóigh tá a lán fianaise eolaíoch ceangailte leis. Trí chuma fhisiciúil féin, tá superiority ag fir mar gheall ar a gcomhdhéanamh matáin tógtha agus struchtúrach.Tá fir níos muiníní ina gcuid siúil, cumarsáide agus idirghníomhaíocht sa saol laethúil.Tá fir praiticiúil agus ní bhfaigheann siad mhothúchánach cosúil le mná. Bíonn mná mar gheall ar a n-intinn bhrionfaíochta go tapa cráite go mothúchánach agus déanann siad cinneadh atá mícheart nó míchuí. Go ginearálta, teastaíonn cosaint ó mhná i ngach cás uafásach cosúil le calmaities nádúrtha, teagmhais fhisiciúla agus tubaistí airgeadais. Chruthaigh Dia fir chun tacú le mná agus chun iad a chosaint mar is cruthú íogair í i gciall fhisiciúil agus mhothúchánach araon. Má tá corp láidir agus praiticiúlacht ag fir, tá lamháltas, foighne agus íobairt ag mná atá chomh buíoch céanna.Ní féidir le fir amháin saol teaghlaigh a bhainistiú agus a rialú, mar tá iarracht agus ranníocaíocht chrua ó mhná freisin. Má tá freagrachtaí sóisialta ar fhir ansin tá sé de fhreagracht ar mhná smacht a fháil ar theach, ar leanaí agus ar fhear céile atá ina thasc éilitheach. De réir an dúlra, bíonn siad níos ionsaithí agus níos dírithe go seachtrach de ghnáth.I gcodarsnacht leis sin, is gnách go gcuimsíonn bean idéalach na dínit istigh.Tá fir láidir go fisiciúil ach tá neart mothúchánach agus meabhrach na mban ag cumhachtú ††�. Tá caidreamh láidir ag fir agus mná agus níl sé salach ar a oiread sin machnaimh.Ní dhearna Dia aon rud atá contrártha sa nádúr, an bhfuil luach comhionann ag an bhfear nó an bhean ar an dúlra.<br/><br/>Déardaoin, 25 Iúil 2019<br/><br/>Léiríonn Umar Sútais i nIdeolaíocht Naitsíoch - Sampla téarma ar an éifeacht fhisiceach a bhaineann le ocras an chomhlachta ar an gcomhlacht, áirítear dramhaíl choirp, so-ghabhálacht don ghalar agus don bhás. Ba iad na Giúdaigh íospartaigh na mbeartas bia Naitsithe.Má tá comhlacht sáinnithe, cuirfidh sé cúiteamh ar easpa iontógáil calorie trí saill comhlacht a ithe.Tá meáchain caillteanas tapa ag comhlachtaí i gcás ina n-éiríonn fiú a n-éadaí ró-mhór dá gcorp. Ceann de na hailt a thaifeadann éifeachtaí na hidirghníomhaíochta le comhlachtaí de chuid na Giúdaigh ba ea diaitinn Oskar Rosenfeld Ghetto. Mar sin féin, ba chomhartha de chlaochlú fisiciúil na n-áitritheoirí ghetto fógra a taifeadadh sa lua ainsealach, €�" na bhFear Collars Tógtha i siopa Barber ag 13 Lutomierka Street†�. Ina dialann Ghetto, bhreathnaigh Rosenfeld tuilleadh go ar an tús, faigheann an bolg bréagach agus sa deireadh sags. Tuairisc ar íospartaigh an ocrais sa Coiméide Dhiaga mar a luaigh Pierre Camporei ina chuid oibre Ara Dreams thug sé faoi deara an sagáil, go raibh gach rud de na daoine a bhí ag faire breise ar an gcaoi a n-íospartaigh an ocrais, €�" Éiríonn an flesh tanaí, agus fós ceangailte leis na cnámha cosúil le Spider-web. †� Bhí na Naitsithe ar an eolas faoi éifeachtaí dúnmharú a gcuid beartas bia, agus cheadaigh siad do na beartais sin leanúint ar aghaidh, rud a d’eascair an mhais-fhorghníomhú na Giúdaigh sna ghettos. Bhí ról ag idé-eolaíochtaí Naitsithe, lena n-áirítear Hummer, purcrates dáileadh bia, póilíní rialta agus speisialta, i measc nithe eile, maidir le próiseas mall an díothaithe na ndaoine Giúdacha trí gorta de dhéantús an duine.<br/><br/>Dé Céadaoin, Iúil 24, 2019<br/><br/>Airgeadas - Aiste Glactar leis seo go bhfuil costas an chaipitil is mó.Mar sin glactar leis é tríd an ráta lascaine do na sreafaí airgid go léir amach anseo is féidir ceann a fháil go héifeachtach ar an NPV dóibh. Ar an gcéad dul síos, teastaíonn costas réalaíoch airgeadais chun costas a shocrú i gcoinne an chaipitil. Cé go bhfuil níos mó ná tréimhse 5 bliana ann, d'fhéadfadh sé go mbeadh brú suntasach ar rátaí úis, bheadh toradh seasta ar thuilleamh a áirithiú trí bhainistiú sreabhadh airgid cuí. Tar éis go léir na réamhaisnéisí sreabhadh airgid thuas Glactar leis go bhfuil tairiseach áfach, i ndáiríre d'fhéadfadh siad a athrú. Tá an cinneadh chun an infheistíocht a dhéanamh bunaithe ar na tuairisceáin is léir a gheofar sa todhchaí trí shreabhadh airgid agus ní chuireann sé san áireamh an fachtóir riosca atá i gceist. Mar shampla, tá neamhaird iomlán déanta ag an infheisteoir ar mhodh CDC toisc gur dócha go measann sé go bhfuil na tuairisceáin sin ina dhiaidh sin críochnaitheach agus go bhfuil siad comlánúil maidir lena luachanna. Léiríonn na ríomhanna DCF agus figiúr NPV na hinfheistíochta iomláine go bhfuil an cinneadh go cothrom inchosanta toisc go bhfuil an NPV cothrom le £ 123,928.60 atá ina luach suntasach i gcoinne brú boilscithe dóchúil sa todhchaí, ie an costas deiseanna caipitil. Braitheann an tábhacht a bhaineann le sreabhadh airgid amach anseo a laghdú trí na foirmlí seo a úsáid ar fhachtóirí eile freisin. Ós rud é gurb é DCF an rud atá toilteanach duine a íoc faoi láthair chun an méid a bhfuil súil aige a bheith aige sa todhchaí a bheith aige, is próiseas é chun sreafaí ioncaim amach anseo a chur in iúl i dtéarmaí luach an lae inniu. Is dócha gurb é an chúis is tábhachtaí taobh thiar de DCF an bhfíric go milleann boilsciú luach an airgid in amanna atá le teacht, ie todhchaí.Dá bhrí sin tá sé riachtanach an caillteanas a dhéanamh. Sin é an fáth a dtagann luach níos ísle ar gach DCF ina dhiaidh sin faoi líon na mblianta. Socraíonn Ráta Inmheánach an Tuairisceáin (IRR) luach reatha gach sreabhadh airgid sa todhchaí d'infheistíocht is ionann agus nialas.<br/><br/>Shakespeare - Aiste Ó Dtín mbaineann leis an tsochaí seo, cuireann Iago in iúl go rathúil Othello's amhras i leith di. Othello go subconscious is ar cheann de na comhaltaí an tsochaí a bheadh in áit enslave dó, más rud é nach raibh sé ag an scil míleata., Mar thoradh air sin, a cheapann sé go Desdemon d'fhéadfadh betray go héasca mar gheall ar a neamhthorthúlacht ciníoch. Mar sin, ar bhealach, is é a sheasamh urramach sa tsochaí bán an t-ardán dá scriosadh féin freisin.Go deimhin tá a fhios ag Iago an imní cine-ioláthraithe seo intinne Othello go han-mhaith., Dá bhrí sin, ionramháil sé go rathúil é a thabhairt faoi a scriosadh. Tá an óráid seo a leanas Othello go leor embmatic dá inferiority-dised le haghaidh Desmona: Tá an comhalta seo níos mó ná macántacht agus a fhios agam gach cainníochtaí, le spiorad fhoghlaim, De pléHaply, do tá mé dubh Agus nach bhfuil na codanna bog de comhrá sin a bhfuil seomraí, nó le haghaidh mé dhiúltaigh isteach ar an luach de bhlianta - fós nach bhfuil sé imithe, mé mí-úsáid, agus ní mór mo fhaoiseamh a bheith le holA thagann diA thagann sí bréagach, neamh mocked féin. Ní chreidfidh mé 't. (An tAcht Shakespeare III, Radharc iii 257-278) Sa ithreachas, léiríonn Othello a chreideamh waving ina bhean chéile Desdemona chastity.... Déanann sé comparáid idir é féin agus na cúirteanna eile atá sibhialta agus dea-chonspóidithe ná mar atá sé. Baineann sé freisin ar fhéidearthacht eile go bhféadfadh Desdemona cheated air mar tá sé d'aois. Ach láithreach, déanann sé an deis sin a bhriseadh agus coimeádann sé a thuairim níos luaithe a d'fhéadfadh Desmona a bheith feall air mar gheall ar a chine. Ach ag deireadh an tsolaite seo athshlánaigh sé a chreideamh i Desmona: €�" Má tá sí bréagach, neamh mocked é féin./ Ní chreidim ‘t.† ‘t (Shaksea Act III, Radharc iii 257-278) Seo rud amháin iontach nach amhras ar Othello riamh go bhfuil Iago. Le linn an dráma ar fad, is cosúil go n-éisteann sé agus go gcreideann sé focail Iago gan aon cheist i bhfad. Fiú eile, dearbhaíonn sé gur fear thar a bheith macánta é Iago a bhfuil léargas domhain aige ar nádúr an duine, mar a deir sé, €�" Tá an fear seo ag cur a bhfuil níos mó ná macántacht/Agus tá a fhios aige gach chainníocht, le spiorad foghlama, / De phléigheann an duine † (Acht Croithíoch III, Radharc iii 257-278). Maidir leis seo, féadfaidh duine a iarraidh ar cén fáth go dteipeann ginearálta ciallmhar a cheistiú ar Iago agus an bhfuil Iago saineolaithe go leor chun mheabhlaireacht a dhéanamh an ginearálta taithí acu. Cé gur chóir mar Othello ginearálta taithí cheist Iago roimh amhras a bhean chéile, go mainneoidh sé a dhéanamh toisc go bhféadfadh sé a bheith blindfolded go páirteach ag an bhfíric go bhfuil Iago mbaineann leis an tsochaí bán a nourishes sé tuiscint a aisghabháil ó thús an-saor in aisce a shaol ann. Ach tá sé blindfolded den chuid is mó ag a disobed don tsochaí., Cé nach cháineann sé an tsochaí go díreach, tá sé féin a stádas ciníoch atá freagrach mar pheaca nó ciontach dó inbheirthe. Mar gheall ar an gcoimpléasc neamh-éiteach ciníoch sin, tá sé neamhchinnte i leith cúblála I Ioga. I sochaí a bhfuil ciníoch ann, tá Othello<br/><br/>Dé Máirt, Iúil 23, 2019<br/><br/>Páipéar Freagartha Sa bhreis, tá an comhthéacs a úsáideann an t-údar níos coitianta i gcomparáid le halt Fry.Tá sé seo toisc go n-úsáideann Brady dearcadh níos pearsanta agus í ag cur trasna a bpointí. Anseo, úsáideann Brady í féin mar phríomhphointe tagartha, rud a fhágann go bhfuil an argóint beo agus a chuireann ina luí ar a leithéid toisc go bhfuil sé scríofa ó thaobh pearsanta. Tá rogha na bhfocal in alt Brady straitéiseach freisin sa mhéid is gur furasta an t-alt a thuiscint ag beagnach aon duine sa tsochaí. Tugann sé seo le tuiscint gur scríobhadh é don lucht féachana i gcoitinne. Ar an láimh eile, tá téama spéisiúil ann freisin, ar mhaith le duine ar bith léamh. Ar an taobh eile, áitíonn alt na Frey ar an dara duine mar phointe tagartha. Fágann sé sin nach bhfuil an t-alt chomh diongbháilte i gcomparáid le ceann a bhfuil scríofa ó thaobh pearsanta de.Déantar rogha na bhfocal le Friey go cúramach do ghrúpa ar leith den daonra; is í an ardliteanais a bhíonn i gceist. Tá Frey ag breithniú nuair a thugann sé dearcadh ginearálta ar an gcaoi a smaoiníonn an chuid is mó daoine agus a mbaintear mí-úsáid as an bhfocal 'smaoineamh'. Ní hamháin go bhfuil an t-alt seo chomh diongbháilte níos lú mar gheall ar an stíl bhreithiúnach a úsáidtear ach freisin mar gheall ar an iarratas deacair ar rogha focal. Tá teideal an ailt diúltach agus míchlú chomh maith. Úsáideann an t-údar go dlúth go háirithe sa teideal. An téama is mó a ghlacann an t-údar, is é sin go dtarlaíonn smaointeoireacht nuair a chuireann duine síos ar smaointe ag baint úsáide as na focail cheart mearbhall.Tá sé seo toisc nach sonraítear sa téama seo cad atá i gceist le focail cheart. Tá sé seo i gcodarsnacht le téama Brady, atá simplí ó thaobh na tuisceana de, rud atá ag teastáil ó chomh fada lena chuid iarrachtaí chun tuiscint a fháil. Tugann téama Brad smaoineamh láithreach don léitheoir go mbeadh cúiseanna áirithe leis an alt seo maidir leis an gcúis go bhfuil gá leis an bhean chéile. Tá earra Frey ar cheann de na príomhchúiseanna a fhéachaim ar an alt seo mar a laghad<br/><br/>Luan, Iúil 22, 2019<br/><br/>Isteach an Aiste Fiáin I scríbhinn €�" Isteach san Wild, bhí † Š Š kakauer rún a uncover na fíricí (nó ar a laghad a fháil chomh gar do na fíricí agus is féidir) máguaird Christopher McCandless turas €�" isteach sa fiáin. Pléann agus cuireann Krakauer teoiricí agus mínithe ar fáil faoi chúiseanna a d’fhéadfadh a bheith marfach, agus cuireann sé imscrúduithe i láthair ar conas a tháinig McCandless chuig stát dá leithéid ina shaol. Tugann Krakauer dúinn smaoineamh éigin ar chúis dhíreach bhás McCanless, agus a chúiseanna leis an méid a rinne sé a dhéanamh. Tá sé mar aidhm ag Krakauer léargas luachmhar a thabhairt do léitheoirí ar intinn na Cealúmanais – conas a tháinig Maclandless ar an smaoineamh dul go dtí fás na hAlasca, cad iad na spreagthaí a bhí aige, conas a bheartaigh sé agus a d’éirigh leis maireachtáil ar an trek grueling, agus is tábhachtaí, â €Å? †�� Tá an t-údar ag iarraidh tuiscint a fháil ar cad a tharla do McCandless sa fiáin, agus a mhíniú cén fáth go bhfuil duine éigin chomh lán sin gealltanas, ar cosúil go bhfuil saol chomh maith sin ar fad aige a d'fhéadfadh a iarraidh, a dhéanamh cad a rinne Ccandless. Mar sin féin, ní ghlacann Krakauer le bheith cinnte faoi chúiseanna gan áireamh, ach cuireann sé roinnt mínithe an-mhaith i láthair agus ligeann sé dúinn aigne gan áireamh a thuiscint níos mó fós. Trí roinnt mhaith rudaí a nochtadh faoi na cúiseanna a bhí le bás McCanless, léiríonn Krakauer dúinn go raibh Maclanless i bhfad níos mó ná amadán simplí agus meargánta a chuir a shaol amú. Caoineadh neamhshoiléir, fear óg cliste a bhí ann, a chuaigh amach isteach sna coillte Alascain le hâ€�’, aimsigh é féin†� agus a athcheangal leis an dúlra. Bhí tionchar mór aige ar an litríocht a bhí á léamh aige, a mhéid a d’éirigh sé, an chuid is mó de gach duine, fear sa tóir air féin agus cuspóir sa saol. D'fhonn a fháil i ndáiríre € �" € Š�  féin, bhraith sé gur gá a ghearradh go léir ceangail ón tsochaí, óna theaghlach, agus é féin a athinsint mar Alexander Supermp, rud a ghearradh a cheangal lena shean-aitheantas. Cibé an bhfuair sé amach an bhfuil sé ag lorg sa fiáin oscailte do tuairimíocht, ach déanann Krakauer cur síos ar thír dhúchais Mhicandless trí na scéalta agus na luachanna a bhí i staid intinne den chineál céanna a chur san áireamh mar McCandless, chomh maith le comhthreomhar lena shaol féin mar shábhóir agus mar eachtrán. Cuireann gach caibidil scéalta éagsúla i láthair ó dhaoine eile a bhí ar an mbóthar céanna le McCandless, daoine a d’fhéach ar sholitr an fiáin freisin. Chuir Krakauer agallamh ar dhaoine a tháinig i dteagmháil le McCandless le linn a thurais. Faoi dheireadh €�"I dtreo an Fiáin, †� faigheann na léitheoirí tuiscint shuntasach ar phearsantachtaí Mhic Léinn. Cibé acu bhí nó nach raibh Macanless cróga nó amaideach, is é a thuras féinfhionnachtana rud ar féidir le beagnach gach duine baint leis agus tuiscint ar leibhéal éigin. Cé go bhfuil an leabhar inrochtana do dhuine ar bith a bhféadfadh spéis éigin a bheith aige i saol agus bás conspóideach Christopher McCandless, is mó atá dírithe orthu siúd a bhfuil meon acu atá cosúil leis na daoine a bhí ag McCanless maidir leis an tsochaí, an dúlra agus conas maireachtáil. €�"Chun an Wild†��� Cabhraíonn sé linn tuiscint a fháil ar charachtar Mhic Cantains, cé go bhfuil sé fós suas chun an léitheoir chun cinneadh a dhéanamh an raibh Mac Cantains € €�€  � nó € € Å† mícheart† i dtaobh an méid a rinne sé a dhéanamh – bíodh sé misneach nó amaideach amháin.<br/><br/>Dé Domhnaigh, 21 Iúil, 2019<br/><br/>Cúis agus Éifeachtaí na nEolaíochtaí Comhshaoil Deireadh Talún Aiste ar Díghrádú Is ceist imní é méadú ar fhormhór na dtíortha. Is coincheap é ina mbíonn tionchar ag luach an chomhshaoil ar chomhcheangal amháin nó níos mó de phróisis a spreag an duine ag gníomhú ar an talamh. Ciallaíonn sé freisin an meath ar mhéid na talún nó na hithreach a théann i bhfeidhm ar fheiniméin ar nós tuilte agus toirní. Tá an díghrádú talún ag bagairt ní amháin ar inmharthanacht na talmhaíochta, ach ar cháilíocht an uisce, ar shláinte an duine, ar an mbithéagsúlacht agus ar na próisis bhunúsacha éiceolaíochta a bhíonn ag brath ar an saol ar fad. Tá roinnt fachtóirí mar thoradh ar chaillteanas talún arúil, go leor acu nó go bhfuil baint acu le forbairt agus le talmhaíocht an duine. Is iad na cúiseanna móra le imréiteach talún amhail gearradh soiléir agus dífhoraoisiú, gníomhaíochtaí talmhaíochta, salandacht uisciúcháin agus rótharraingte, beostoic, lena n-áirítear ró-gharraing, truailliú agus tionsclaíocht. Is fadhb choitianta í overgraning i go leor áiteanna san Astráil.Tá sé mar thoradh ar ainmhithe, caoirigh, eallach, nó ainmhithe eile adhlactha i gcoitinne, iad go léir tiubhaithe sa cheantar amháin, iad uile ag beathú ar an bhféar agus toir.Tá an ithir go daingean le chéile. Fágann baint féir agus toir an ghaoil ithir agus so-ghabhálach i leith creimeadh an uisce.Is féidir leis an ithir a bhriseadh suas nó a dhlúthú le crúba, déanann sé seo an fhadhb níos measa. Is éard atá i dífhoraoisiú ná éiceachóras foraoise agus athchóiriú na talún a bhaint go dtí tírdhreach eile. Tá sé difriúil ó ghearradh soiléir, lena mbaineann baint iomlán de na crainn ina seasamh ach fágann an ithir i riocht chun fás foraoise nua má tá síolta ar fáil. Is éard atá i gceist le rótharraingt ná an próiseas chun screamhuisce a bhaint amach thar toradh sábháilte nó toradh cothromaíochta an uisceadáin. Ós rud é go n-imíonn gach cuan screamhuisce ar ráta difriúil ag brath ar chleachtais frasaíochta, clúdaigh fhásta agus caomhnaithe ithreach, athraíonn méid an screamhuisce is féidir a phumpáil go sábháilte i measc réigiún an domhain agus fiú laistigh de chúigí. Teastaíonn tréimhse an-fhada ó roinnt uisce chun recharge agus dá bhrí sin is féidir leis an bpróiseas ró-dhréachtadh a bheith iarmhairtí a thriomú go héifeachtach suas fo-dhromchla soláthairtí áirithe uisce. Is é an toradh is mó atá ar dhíghrádú talún ná laghdú suntasach ar tháirgiúlacht talún. Áirítear ar na próisis díghrádaithe talún creimeadh ithreach, ídiú cothaitheach, salandú, díchloiniú agus aigéadú ithreach nó alcaileacht.Is próiseas nádúrtha é ithir a bhaineann le hithir ón talamh. Is í an ghné chriticiúil den ithir a bhaineann leis an gcuspóir seo ná go bhfuil ráta an phróisis ag brath go mór ar ghníomhaíochtaí daonna. Tá rátaí nádúrtha creimthe ar ithir níos ísle le haghaidh ithreach le clúdach maith fásra ná mar atá le haghaidh ithreach lom. Go deimhin, cuireann aon ghníomhartha daonna a thagann chun cinn ithir (feirmeoireacht, logáil isteach, tógáil, ró-dhorganú, dóiteáin, srl) feabhas mór ar rátaí creimthe ithreach.Is ionann salandú ithreach agus tiúchan salainn i ddromchla nó gar dromchla na hithreach. Baineann sé leis na próisis carnadh salainn sa chrios fréimhe uachtarach ionas go mbeidh go leor plandaí coiscthe nó toirmiscthe ó ghnáthfhás.Is fadhb mhór é salandsúchán a laghdaítear an duine agus is minic a bhaineann sé le huisciú ar scála mór. Saland Sláintíocht Dryland Nuair a bhíonn na dtrilandaí uisciú, gabhann an t-uisce go tapa, ag fágáil salainn taobh thiar roimhe seo a thuaslagadh.Is féidir leis na salainn seo a bhailiú, ós rud é nach bhfuil mórán báistí ann chun an córas a flash. Cuireann an salann san ithir cosc ar uisce a ghlacadh trí fréamhacha plandaí agus ní féidir leis an ithir cumhdach glantach a chothú a thuilleadh.Is fadhb thábhachtach í caillteanas na cothaithigh sa tsalandacht uisciúcháin i réigiúin thalmhaíocht ar lag-ionchuir, amhail an Afraic. I réigiúin den sórt sin, nuair a éiríonn barra, cothaithigh riachtanacha a ghlacadh ar shiúl sa barr agus ní chuirtear in ionad iad. Tarlaíonn an tréigean aon uair a thosaíonn limistéar neamh-fhuirsiúil ag taispeáint na saintréithe a bhaineann le fíor-dréimhe. Tháinig na Náisiúin Aontaithe ar an téarma sa bhliain 1977. Níl an chúis is mó le díspreagadh, ach ní dhéantar an bainistiú ar thalamh, lena n-áirítear ró-dhíothlú agus mothú crann agus scuabadhmad le haghaidh breoslaí. Is é an t-aigéadú ithreach nuair a úsáidtear ceimiceáin áirithe ar an ithir, ar chúiseanna éagsúla lena n-áirítear lotnaidicídí, salann ón dromchla agus an ithir, báisteach aigéadach, fás barr áirithe ainmhithe agus srl, is minic a shútear na ceimiceáin seo san ithir agus is cuid den struchtúr ithreach iad. Leis na ceimiceáin seo anois mar chuid den ithir, d’fhéadfadh an ithir a bheith aigéadach agus dá bhrí sin ní fhásfaidh barra agus féaracha dá bhrí sin. D’fhéadfadh laghdú táirgiúlachta suas go 50% a bheith mar thoradh ar aigéadú ithreach. Is ithir chré é akalinization ithir le pH ard (> 9), drochstruchtúr ithreach agus cumas íseal insíothlú ithreach.Is é is aidhm d’ithreacha alcaile a n-airíonna fisiceiméireacha neamhfhabhracha a úsáid go príomha chun carbónáit sóidiam a dhéanamh, rud a fhágann go n-éireoidh an ithir ina chúis le atrach. Uaireanta tagraítear do na hithreacha seo mar (alcaillíne) mar dhroch-éifeacht na díghrádú talún, ar cuid shuntasach de na tailte arúil, ag laghdú saibhris agus forbairt eacnamaíoch na náisiún. De réir mar a thagann an t-acmhainn talún chun cinn agus nuair a thagann laghdú ar an bhfás ar líon na mbarr, is lú an t-ábhar a bhíonn ann, agus is lú an t-ardú ar acmhainní ó thuaidh a chuirtear an bonn le chéile. Dá bhrí sin, cruthaítear bíseach éiceolaíoch síos nuair a imsclaítear tailte i bplandaí trí chleachtais neamh-inbhuanaithe bainistíochta talún as a dtagann cobhsaíocht ithreach caillte as a dtagann athrú buan. Ní hamháin go mbíonn tionchar níos suntasaí ag díghrádú talún ar tháirgiúlacht ithreach ach tá tionchar níos suntasaí aige freisin ar acmhainní uisce a fháil.Ó tharla go seachadtar ithir in éineacht le cothaithigh agus éillithe a bhaineann leis an ithir i gcainníochtaí móra le timpeallachtaí. Dá bhrí sin, d’fhéadfadh tionchar a bheith ag díghrádú talún ar lochanna agus taiscumair atá deartha chun tuilte a mhaolú agus hidr-Cumhacht a ghiniúint. San achoimre, áirítear creimeadh ithreach, salandú, aigéadú na hithreach nó alcaileacht agus díghrádú.Tá ráta na díghrádaithe méadaithe go mór le fás i ndaonra agus teicneolaíocht an duine.
